Donald J. Trump September 30th, 2021
Snuck into the government funding bill, or CR, the Democrats are trying to pass, and just found, is unlimited money to random, unscreened, unvetted Afghan nationals. Republicans can't let this happen. This is a further insult after Biden's humiliating withdrawal from Afghanistan, that needlessly killed 13 Americans.

This is not a “clean” government funding bill. It’s a major immigration rewrite that allows Biden to bring anyone he wants from Afghanistan for the next year—no vetting, no screening, no security—and fly them to your community with free welfare and government-issued IDs. We’ve already seen some of the horrible assaults and sex crimes that have taken place. But these terrible assaults will just be the tip of the iceberg of what’s coming if this isn’t shut down.

The CR even covers people who don’t live in Afghanistan and haven’t in many years, as long as they used to live there. So Biden and Blinken can load up planes of former Afghans from Pakistan or elsewhere without any limits, checks or even a lawful visa or refugee status. The only “rule” is that Mayorkas—an incompetent radical—give them a green light. This bill must be opposed!

Trump September 30th, 2021 Snuck into the government funding bill, or CR, the Democrats are trying to pass, and just found, is unlimited money to random, unscreened, unvetted Afghan nationals. Republicans can't let this happen. This is a further insult after Biden's humiliating withdrawal from Afghanistan, that needlessly killed 13 Americans. This is not a “clean” government funding bill. It’s a major immigration rewrite that allows Biden to bring anyone he wants from Afghanistan for the next year—no vetting, no screening, no security—and fly them to your community with free welfare and government-issued IDs. We’ve already seen some of the horrible assaults and sex crimes that have taken place. But these terrible assaults will just be the tip of the iceberg of what’s coming if this isn’t shut down. The CR even covers people who don’t live in Afghanistan and haven’t in many years, as long as they used to live there. So Biden and Blinken can load up planes of former Afghans from Pakistan or elsewhere without any limits, checks or even a lawful visa or refugee status. The only “rule” is that Mayorkas—an incompetent radical—give them a green light. This bill must be opposed! | ---|--- Donald J. Mariannette’s race was the closest in the country last year. She won by just six votes, and she needs all of us to step up and help her win again.

Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats are doubling down. They know that if they defeat Mariannette, odds are they keep the U.S. House. **We have to fight back harder than ever before — can we count on you to step up right now?**

_We’re running out of time to stop Trumpism in Virginia!_

Virginia voters are heading to the polls **_every day_** and right now, **it looks like Trumpism is making a comeback!**

We need to turn out strong Democrats who believe in saving Democracy, but if we don’t hit our end-of-month $25,000 goal, **_we won’t have the resources it’ll take._**

[**Can you pitch in just $15 right now to help us hit our end-of-September goal? body:
Got an update |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=31940e8c06&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

I just talked with my treasurer and she says we have only $6k left to reach our goal! I would hate to come so close and not get there. Since the deadline expires midnight tonight for this fiscal quarter, [will you contribute whatever you can by then?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=aa9510caa1&e=44b8c466b0)

I really appreciate your support. Because of you, I am able to win this election and keep fighting for what is right to include decertification, more audits, more canvassing, and securing our elections.

[$10, $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or even all the way to the max - $5,300](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=df442763e6&e=44b8c466b0). Whatever you can do, I am greatly appreciative and won't let you down!

DONATE: [https://secure.anedot.com/mark-finchem-for-secretary-of-state/sr](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2a689ea4a8&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=fb6c12d9e3&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

| | It's going to be a tough battle in WA-03, where the incumbent voted to impeach 45 and is facing a slew of his supporters challenging her from her own side. One of those opponents has embraced lies about election fraud so tightly that he is already [planning to call for an audit of the 2022 primary here](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/1cNmuwdht/c?w=zmuPQF0mEXaNHYkJNXM1XBgoFaIe4SqrtQtSfw7NPFc.), even though a single ballot has yet to be cast. I am [100% Pro-choice because of lived experience](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/1cNmuwdht/c?w=0mrpTQmv_QwzXFf-BjbmKInZZR-wv69Yxwa6E_h8_RA.), and I believe [healthcare relates to the whole of the person](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/1cNmuwdht/c?w=NLdxAHnOggdzLG0uSq9WvTEpaaMp9UpsIF6fzvJ6HiM.), not just a Doctor appointment. Help me get the word out, and together we can [#FLIPWA03](https://www.brenthennrich.com/so/1cNmuwdht/c?w=HhK4-X0IqWeYAKqjZg8-kwFoxvSv1QrPSmU27t5np4E.) In politics, support garners more support. These quarterly fundraising numbers are what many people look at to determine whether or not they want to endorse a candidate. name: Sarah (iPhone)
subject: appreciate you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
I hope next week I’m reaching out to report that together we did it. But right now, I need your help. Peter, Bryan and I are just about to put our kiddos to bed, but first I wanted to send a quick note telling you how much I appreciate your support over the last eight months of this campaign (and beyond that going back to my time as White House Press Secretary). Our family could not have made it this far without you.

Sometimes, the campaign trail is pretty exhausting...a lot of travel, a lot of listening, a lot of answering questions, and a lot of worry about the future of our great state and country. But when I feel a little tired, my mind always goes back to these 3 kids we're about to put to bed. Their future - and the future of all of our children and grandchildren - are absolutely worth the long days and little sleep. It is for them that I will always keep fighting for our freedom and against the dangerous policies of the radical left.

We are a few hours away from our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline and my team just let me know we are still a little over $7,000 short of our goal. Could you take a minute or two to click and donate whatever you can to our cause? **[SarahForGovernor.com/Deadline](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=beeca4f572294e3bb0255b113c51b061&_e=rN2VjMaNKXIW6pqceYLhmsVGg1xH6RhsHIL_uDzkIjewu03OZpwgZgOh9ljJPKhDtF9wTBNMztTxMgQYNy39BksMkHpd33P3nKu7klKWGCUam8V-n4TcJUEQQJiunadxuYb4UpkJWFs1JWbWQDUE4XXX-honC9lnR4rMzV7iKwWsFsK8qms-fn2ku3gnreFWnmTs0rTcsy-2OAF4nCZd8OW9uGX9TmITMayYocBTarvUTHEWtGT28eea0EXjjb6MOh-8ZyJ7L1Zz7JmLVjcl56PxV8NmehUz65DjeeTRELcrOnmgY-OrpzEdLK2f8BUc0LZ98dJx3DSKHb8mm6naLyusEi0uPh-v7qAV85YtgODpLKBkjVvX4d6Xu1xDIPCkxdpvUB6q7FwTbvTEP0xY11jFJicXh9wMXw3QfJ5UyFw%3D)**

Thank you so much,
Sarah

body:
#
Peter, we’re going to keep this brief.
The pressure is increasing on progressives tonight to move forward on a small bill _without_ passing President Biden’s Build Back Better Act to expand Medicare, secure universal child care, pre-K, and community college, fight climate change, invest in affordable housing, and so much more.
**Not on our watch. We need to hold strong.**
[**Can you show that you have Pramila’s back and want her to hold the line for working people by chipping in toward our movement right now before the vote?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7241?refcode=em20210930-681&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=681%2E420207%2E9Mrw_G)_We’re also coming up on an important end-of-quarter deadline at midnight tonight, and publishing big fundraising numbers on our quarterly FEC filing is one of the best ways we can show off the strong public support for our progressive agenda:_

Team Jayapal

##### September 30, 2021
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is proud to be a sponsor of the Mississippi Rally for Medical Freedom.
**This is your time to stand up and be counted for our children & for the future of our country**!
Join us for a family-friendly patriotic event!
Saturday
October 9th, 2021
10am-4pm
**_The Sillers Pedestrian Mall is a beautiful grassy area between the MS Supreme Court Building and the Sillers Office Building, just across from the MS State Capitol on High Street_** _.

_**Bring your lawn chairs, blankets and awnings** , and American flags! Come enjoy an afternoon of family-friendly, patriotic fellowship as we take a united stand for medical freedom.
To Register and find more information go to [www.rallyformedicalfreedom.com](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzg2NTUwNjc4MjE5Mzk3OTYxJmM9ZDlnNiZlPTAmYj03NDA5NTU4NzUmZD1nMXM5bzJz.VaGHgXfE0wrwcpQCU-Sc4CltVFe0CkN0Ip7_fypMZ0Q)

| Learn more about the Mississippi Freedom Caucus
---
The Mississippi Freedom Caucus is founded by elected officials who believe in freedom and liberty for the people of Mississippi. We are the voice of citizens who want bold action to protect life, strengthen families, defend our constitutional rights, limit government, and revitalize personal and economic freedoms in the state of Mississippi.
| [Find out more](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNzg2NTUwNjc4MjE5Mzk3OTYxJmM9ZDlnNiZlPTAmYj03NDA5NTU5MTEmZD1sNXM1YTRw.d-wAsU5RVLP2ZgFI8Njx2E4g_6tKjXp1Z4YKyNJzvYI)

Fellow Conservative - This is a very important week for our campaign.

If you've looked at your calendar recently, you know the end of the 3rd quarter is TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT.

For most folks, September 30th doesn't mean much. For us, it is a critical date BECAUSE after midnight TONIGHT, we'll have to make public what we have been able to raise for our Senate campaign since announcing just four weeks ago.

**[Fellow Conservative, would you please spare 16 seconds of your time and watch the video I recorded for you?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e714498a9baa44c49b404f417aa3ff7c&_e=CDZRSdAzsBo6E3VaI5b7X-ItD3e1YQYpQcBkC9PQKBh2scu50vLUg9-8TaAxzz_E5sn3U0FGkYRh8QN_sk_A7TGzxEpw9BOrhRfpenc8r2iLUABeaTm0ZeoUcygjlKMUbW4RAdRoiAnPnVxDpx-JNUHWowcyEiuu-GbEcNtsXK914GAkfjKOKrPqjJytJMbTZ8rnHEyaIWiFToAuBp4PaDMDFBvJa36F2G6P0iRQNq9KPWCSp1jLhoj0xpxVjXZ6iv6_-wL79d7XOWDhPxuzD5LPkcDLozhXeM6Xv_qpJ86_8rPzK2MDNJImGTbJP9w0MrX3ur1M-9RnSK2n-kMr7KLiyRFJYPFOo6RnsVcoTDDXjbvGO4a9YodEngz4bHfiK2n5kYVt4n0VZfLFTqEw4E9ApUSxFe09sj9uT2YrInIjnfRasnsd5l3qEKe_6yVr4nDOLM9quIsTGdD6QIsvli5_rJmfvLAS2tdmY8mYxtk%3D)** Then, if you're able to make a gift to our campaign, please consider doing so. Come next week, the entire country will know the strength of our campaign - and I want everyone to know we are strong enough to win.

**I need your support to hit all of our goals while there is still time left.**

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e714498a9baa44c49b404f417aa3ff7c&_e=CDZRSdAzsBo6E3VaI5b7X-ItD3e1YQYpQcBkC9PQKBh2scu50vLUg9-8TaAxzz_E5sn3U0FGkYRh8QN_sk_A7TGzxEpw9BOrhRfpenc8r2iLUABeaTm0ZeoUcygjlKMUbW4RAdRoiAnPnVxDpx-JNUHWowcyEiuu-GbEcNtsXK914GAkfjKOKrPqjJytJMbTZ8rnHEyaIWiFToAuBp4PaDMDFBvJa36F2G6P0iRQNq9KPWCSp1jLhoj0xpxVjXZ6iv6_-wL79d7XOWDhPxuzD2wlzMdwwJfBUhsPCU0WDbK1y7xo6CHeixpSQzGvU6s7S0rUMBaU1gaduG_2L9fg6gjHaTsLCG7cMgTOIKqedxWslVZiGRu9JjC8ddm_SRjKm7xeCBhDS7LG4WnFpI5rBXVPMm83pRdA8gCyHPdy9P_EEbxcapHVIzzzV8s-SNW5mCsosN0c9KfNhCWWi0dbF20wVaGhTFLWGkVVRA1D_sU%3D)
Here are three reasons why our Q3 numbers are important:
1. My opponent already has $10 million in his war chest, and National Democrats just announced they are spending millions of dollars to launch the earliest ground game ever seen in Georgia. We need immediate resources to fight back.
2. Political pundits will look at our numbers to gauge the strength and depth of our fundraising operation.
3. The amount raised in the 3rd quarter will send a signal to potential donors about our prospects of winning this race.

I hope you're in my corner, Fellow Conservative.

Thank you,

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e714498a9baa44c49b404f417aa3ff7c&_e=CDZRSdAzsBo6E3VaI5b7X-ItD3e1YQYpQcBkC9PQKBh2scu50vLUg9-8TaAxzz_E5sn3U0FGkYRh8QN_sk_A7TGzxEpw9BOrhRfpenc8r2iLUABeaTm0ZeoUcygjlKMUbW4RAdRoiAnPnVxDpx-JNUHWowcyEiuu-GbEcNtsXK914GAkfjKOKrPqjJytJMbTZ8rnHEyaIWiFToAuBp4PaDMDFBvJa36F2G6P0iRQNq9KPWCSp1jLhoj0xpxVjXZ6iv6_-wL79d7XOWDhPxuzDyq3YYaYnFlrMzEiLrVBsCzbjvfXrRqEDx408TUOPZgeGI03SRPsBqiuZ-LuSpklA31yfpgvdjjnIBCpVP-OWx7FJCoodx4xaLR2PUXtYPRAueTKiYc0SOQ4OFYd9WgZZdJKh2Dm-0Fk3drMN8de0Fh1ib0n9otzAnwN4M1MbGquSmyI-Bs8QiM7eKV0rjpJ9_GOEWyZSJS8Eracg5hrzIo%3D)

subject: Midnight deadline!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Have you stepped up? [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctdilik-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Congressman Fitzgerald said you wouldn't let us down.Not when the majority of Congress is at stake next year!**Will you chip in with a contribution of $20.22 (or another amount) before midnight?** [MIDNIGHT DEADLINE >> Chip in $20.22](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctdilik-ahkdjtlkr-y/) We only have hours left before the most critical end-of-quarter deadline of this campaign!Just like Scott Fitzgerald fights for you every day in Congress, we are fighting every day to take away Nancy Pelosi's power.Will you step forward to help get the job done? [Seize Back The Majority - Take Back The Border!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctdilik-ahkdjtlkr-j/) It doesn't have to be much. Any amount that fits your budget right now will put us closer to regaining the majority.Thanks,
Fitzgerald Finance Team [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctdilik-ahkdjtlkr-t/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctdilik-ahkdjtlkr-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctdilik-ahkdjtlkr-k/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ctdilik-ahkdjtlkr-u/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

clean_body: I recorded a video message on my phone for you. Can you spare 16 seconds to watch it today? I recorded a video message on my phone for you. Can you spare 16 seconds to watch it today? | Fellow Conservative - This is a very important week for our campaign. If you've looked at your calendar recently, you know the end of the 3rd quarter is TONIGHT AT MIDNIGHT. For most folks, September 30th doesn't mean much. For us, it is a critical date BECAUSE after midnight TONIGHT, we'll have to make public what we have been able to raise for our Senate campaign since announcing just four weeks ago. Then, if you're able to make a gift to our campaign, please consider doing so. Come next week, the entire country will know the strength of our campaign - and I want everyone to know we are strong enough to win. I need your support to hit all of our goals while there is still time left. Here are three reasons why our Q3 numbers are important: 1. My opponent already has $10 million in his war chest, and National Democrats just announced they are spending millions of dollars to launch the earliest ground game ever seen in Georgia. We need immediate resources to fight back. 2. Political pundits will look at our numbers to gauge the strength and depth of our fundraising operation. 3. The amount raised in the 3rd quarter will send a signal to potential donors about our prospects of winning this race. I hope you're in my corner, Fellow Conservative. Thank you, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC.

name: David Horowitz
subject: Black LIES Matter
body:
Peter, Black Lives Matter has orchestrated the greatest civil destruction in America in our history. They lie systematically about the deaths of armed black criminals resisting arrest. They lied about George Floyd to incite deadly riots across the country. Even Keith Ellison, an Antifa supporter and - as Minnesota's Attorney General - the chief prosecutor attempting to turn the death of George Floyd into a murder - conceded that _they could not find any racial element in Floyd 's death._ That's a fact most people don't know. _The summer of unprecedented insurrectionary violence by Black Lives Matter was based on a monstrous lie._ Black Lives Matter doesn't want to fight "systemic racism" or end police brutality... **They 're Fidel Castro-adoring communists, and they want an end to America once and for all.** _And if patriots like you and me don 't arm yourselves with the facts, they'll get exactly what they've been after._ [**That 's why I wrote _I Can 't Breathe_ \-- and why I want you to be one of the first to receive a copy.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58446000:6lx0Jo2N_:m:1:3253819041:2BD42BC044CE83D9A49A5FE375793235:r) The truth is, when a black person dies at the hands of police, Black Lives Matter is happy. It gives them a martyr for their cause and a phony pretext for calling the police genocidal racists. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58446000:6lx0Jo2N_:m:1:3253819041:2BD42BC044CE83D9A49A5FE375793235:r) In fact, as I demonstrate in my latest book _I Can 't Breathe: How A Racial Hoax Is Killing America_ virtually every Black Lives Matter claim is based on a series of brazen lies facilitated by our corrupt national media. Take Breonna Taylor. Black Lives Matter portrayed Breonna as an innocent 26-year-old "murdered" in her home, in her bed, in her sleep by racist cops. In fact Breonna was an active long-term accomplice to a major drug dealer. The cops were at her house (and four others) because Breonna used her house and bank account to operate the drug network delivering dangerous, life-destroying narcotics to the black community. She did not die in her sleep. She died in her hallway in the dark because her boyfriend, without warning, fired his gun at police and wounded one of them. Breonna died because her boyfriend did not warn her to step back out of the hallway when he was about to shoot. In other words everything about the Breonna Taylor case as told by Black Lives Matter is a lie. I've selected 26 of the most prominent cases that Black Lives Matter used to make its case against America's police, and against America itself -- and virtually every case that Black Lives Matter has made against police to fan the flames of Marxist revolt, destroy American cities, and de-fund American police departments is _based on lies_. These lies are not innocent. They're dangerous, and they're jeopardizing the future of our country. _I Can 't Breathe_ is the antidote, debunking Black Lives Matter's bogus claims and arming you with the facts to refute them. [**And if you donate $45 or more to the David Horowitz Freedom Center right now, you 'll be one of the first to receive your copy. If you donate $75 or more, I'll send you a signed copy, and if you donate $100 or more I'll send you a personalized copy.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58446000:6lx0Jo2N_:m:1:3253819041:2BD42BC044CE83D9A49A5FE375793235:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58446000:6lx0Jo2N_:m:1:3253819041:2BD42BC044CE83D9A49A5FE375793235:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58446000:6lx0Jo2N_:m:1:3253819041:2BD42BC044CE83D9A49A5FE375793235:r) You see, this couldn't just be an article or an entry in a database online. Big Tech is working in lockstep with the Democratic Party and Black Lives Matter. They're doing everything they can to silence the truth -- so we have to share the truth where they can't censor it. But first, I think I should introduce myself. My name is David Horowitz and when I was a young man, I led the movement destroying America today. 40 years ago I was a communist... ...and not just any communist. I was side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited a radical, thought leading magazine in the far Left movement. I marched, I chanted, I organized. Thankfully, the veil was lifted, and I saw the radical Left for who they really were. We weren't making America a better, fairer place -- we were ruining everything that made it great. So I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan and never looked back. I created the David Horowitz Freedom Center because I knew what was happening, I knew what was at stake, and I knew that if I didn't tell the American people what I knew, we'd lose our country forever. _What we 're seeing today didn't happen overnight. It's no coincidence. It's no stroke of luck. It's a plot that's been decades in the making._ For decades now, the Freedom Center has been in the trenches, saying what no one else would dare to and warning of what was to come. We've been targeted by MasterCard, DiscoverCard, the Southern Poverty Law Center and so many more because we're effective. My new book is an extension of that, and I want you to be the first to have it. [**So don 't waste a moment -- donate $45 or more to my Freedom Center right away, and as a thank you for your generosity, I'll send you a complimentary copy of _I Can 't Breathe._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58446000:6lx0Jo2N_:m:1:3253819041:2BD42BC044CE83D9A49A5FE375793235:r) _If you donate $75 or more, I 'll send you a signed copy, and if you donate $100 or more I'll send you a personalized copy._ Even if you're fully equipped to dispel the Left's lies about police brutality, I know someone in your life needs to read this. **Because America won 't survive if we keep letting them lie.** Just look at what's happened to our cities in the last year. The Black Lives Matter protests and riots last summer ended more black lives in 2 weeks than police took in all of 2019. ...and last summer is just a preview of what's to come if we don't stand up for the truth. The truth is, the United States is the least racist country in the history of the world. The truth is, the only people that benefit from Black Lives Matter are their Marxist leaders -- and of course their race hustling, America hating friends in media and government. The truth is, Black Lives Matter's only purpose is to turn black tragedy into white Leftist power. If you believe our country is worth fighting for, and worth saving from these Left Wing radicals, I hope you'll stand with us. Sincerely, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58446000:6lx0Jo2N_:m:1:3253819041:2BD42BC044CE83D9A49A5FE375793235:r) David Horowitz P.S. Black Lives Matter's MO is simple: break down law and order, fuel race hatred, destroy America. They use black corpses as props for their Marxist agenda. I wrote _I Can 't Breathe_ because I want patriots like you to have the information you need to expose and defeat their deceit to the American people, [**and if you make a generous donation today of $45 or more, I 'll send you a complimentary copy.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58446000:6lx0Jo2N_:m:1:3253819041:2BD42BC044CE83D9A49A5FE375793235:r) [**CLAIM YOUR EXCLUSIVE COPY OF _I CAN'T BREATHE_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58446000:6lx0Jo2N_:m:1:3253819041:2BD42BC044CE83D9A49A5FE375793235:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58446000:6lx0Jo2N_:m:1:3253819041:2BD42BC044CE83D9A49A5FE375793235:r) The David Horowitz Freedom Center is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.
All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. **[Support the Freedom Center](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58446000:6lx0Jo2N_:m:1:3253819041:2BD42BC044CE83D9A49A5FE375793235:r)** (C) David Horowitz Freedom Center | www.HorowitzFreedomCenter.org
P.O. Box 55089, Sherman Oaks, CA 91499

body:
I’m grateful
| | |

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36828294/309261080/-2023814932?refcode=20211001.1_TM_10A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjczYTRiYy1hNjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOgcwBu5U2iH6_lT3FMetCgIa_W_VlTpriYWEVamAYI=)

| | Derek, we are heading into the final month of this campaign, so I wanted to reach out before things get too crazy.

September was our biggest fundraising month yet — and that’s all thanks to you. I can’t thank you enough for being part of my team.

When I got into this race, I knew it was going to be a tough fight. But I’m proud of the work that we’ve done, and heading into the final stretch, I know we’ve got what it takes to finish strong.

So Derek, I’m humbly asking you to stick with me for these final weeks so together, we can defeat Glenn Youngkin, end Trumpism in Virginia and keep Virginia moving forward. September was big — but if we’re going to win this race, October has to be even bigger.

_**[Today, will you make a contribution to my campaign to power our efforts through the finish line?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36828295/309261081/-2023814932?refcode=20211001.1_TM_10A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjczYTRiYy1hNjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOgcwBu5U2iH6_lT3FMetCgIa_W_VlTpriYWEVamAYI=)**_

We truly are building the largest grassroots movement that Virginia has ever seen, and I’m so glad to have you with me.

_**[Thank you for joining me by chipping in whenever you can.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36828296/309261082/-2023814932?refcode=20211001.1_TM_10A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjczYTRiYy1hNjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOgcwBu5U2iH6_lT3FMetCgIa_W_VlTpriYWEVamAYI=)**_

With gratitude,

Terry McAuliffe | **[DONATE>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36828297/309261083/-2023814932?refcode=20211001.1_TM_10A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjczYTRiYy1hNjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOgcwBu5U2iH6_lT3FMetCgIa_W_VlTpriYWEVamAYI=)**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpf0s4psqb6abf0i8vbf73r3mhuitbopa30hd508_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c1geeo76cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onncdh66cjmeuq72s3hm6obao70ehhm1cliepim8tpm6aoj0pj1mmqebddnmdj6eduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg75cr66hjjad9nmthmcc9gm9h3csh5u)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqiokfb36c24cvh34h6uauh9t46625948mbms6mo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c1geeo76cdh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z58v3561mr9cogc8q0n62sogdlfchsur7269bnp8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c1geeo76cdh2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zad41jp5u8rqvvnv4l1rsfn709ib8iuorcoql34g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c1geeo76cdh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmgs6ru91fak2o4u0gm00u8ockvu4k09ftjqvnrg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c1geeo76cdh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsafafa9to7d7hr6mhv4hmiqigcf6jqsoi1i3dr8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c1geeo76cdh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6i7s91oaugm0obeikgkpp0a4hup6cmptulgaosg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6c1geeo76cdh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Three Star Dinner is HERE 🎉
body:
https://tndp.org/threestar/ [https://tndp.org/threestar/]Dear Peter,
We are thrilled to announce that Congressman Conor Lamb of Pennsylvania will be the keynote speaker for this year's Three Star Dinner. Congressman Lamb is a Marine and a former federal prosecutor who is running for the U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania and currently represents Pennsylvania's 17th congressional district in the Pittsburgh area. He was first elected in a high-profile special election in 2018, when he won a district that Trump had won by nearly 20 points. Lamb won reelection twice in 2018 and 2020 in two of the most competitive congressional races in the country.
We are excited to be welcoming Congressman Lamb in person, in Nashville, on October 30th at the Renaissance Hotel, and I hope you will join us. Doors will open at 6 pm CT and dinner will begin at 6:30. COVID precautions will be taken, including proof of vaccination and/or a negative COVID test from within the previous 24 hours.
Here are the ticket and table options:
General Admission — $150
GENERAL ADMISSION TICKETS [https://secure.ngpvan.com/shtDTDilf0OUrgNWP1bKiQ2]Sponsorships
☑️ $1,200 – Table for 8 guests, slideshow recognition
☑️ $2,500 – Table for 8 guests, slideshow recognition, name/logo on tables, 2 VIP tickets
☑️ $5,000 – Table for 8 guests, slideshow recognition, half page ad, 8 guests drink tickets, honorable mention, name/logo on tables, 4 VIP tickets, Governor’s Club membership
☑️ $10,000 – Table for 8 guests, slideshow recognition, full page ad, unlimited guests drink tickets, honorable mention, name/logo on tables, 8 VIP tickets, President’s Club membership
☑️ $25,000 – 2 tables of 8 guests, slideshow recognition, full page ad, unlimited guests drink tickets, honorable mention, name/logo on tables, 16 VIP tickets, memorabilia gift set, President’s Club membership
SPONSOR [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xYg8Er1aCUqL7f-dDt_gzg2]Program Booklet Ads
☑️ $250 – Business Card
☑️ $500 – Quarter Page Ad
☑️ $750 – Half Page Ad
☑️ $1,000 – Full Page Ad
Click below and scroll to the bottom to purchase a program booklet ad.
PROGRAM BOOKLET AD [https://tndp.org/threestar/]We couldn't be more excited to host an in-person Three Star Dinner this year, and we hope you join us for a fun and engaging evening with fellow Democrats. Hope to see you on October 30th!
Thank you for being a Tennessee Democrat,
Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]https://www.facebook.com/tndem [https://www.facebook.com/tndem] https://twitter.com/tndp [https://twitter.com/tndp] https://www.instagram.com/tndems [https://www.instagram.com/tndems]
CAROL V. ABNEY, TREASURER NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. CONTRIBUTIONS OR GIFTS TO TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY ARE NOT TAX DEDUCTIBLE.
Tennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

Derek, Virginia made incredible progress under Terry’s leadership. If his opponent succeeds in using his deep pockets to buy the Virginia Governor's office, he will reverse the progress made across the Commonwealth.

**For Terry to win, he’ll need to build the biggest grassroots army in the history of Virginia politics. He can do it, but he needs our help.**

****
Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.

**[Please, donate to Terry’s campaign right now and become a part of his historic movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36836797/309288922/-2023814932?refcode=20211001.2_SA_10D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTdjMTViMS1iYjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aWQERJgAfY2SZJ7vP_AvjVxs6T8rSHDdzOR2ytFvzO4=)**

I’m counting on you, Derek.

Stacey Abrams

name: Dave Giles for Congress
subject: Save America
body:
Hello Peter! Our freedoms are being taken away by the left socialist. As Americans we believe in th
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=4152827.4642.1.7fe17ab6a2a0453b317b356613a6e6cc)
---
**__Hello Peter!**
---
**Our freedoms are being taken away by the left socialist.**
As Americans we believe in the freedom to achieve and make a better life for ourselves, just like our forefathers. **I will go to Washington to stop the Madness.**
Stop the overreach of DC taking away states’ rights and your personal rights,
both guaranteed by the Constitution and Bill of Rights. **I am TECHNICALLY COMPETENT**
I have a bachelors’ degree in electrical engineering, multiple internet certifications, Rescue Diver and I am a Jet Pilot. **I am BUSINESS ORIENTED**
For the better use of taxpayer dollars. I have an MBA, worked for the largest oil company in the world and have a federal firearms license. **I am CHRISTIAN**
I have a bachelor’s degree in theology with two master’s degrees, my doctorate as ABD. I have written an advanced theology book
and I attend church weekly. I am well educated, experienced and capable of representing you in DC.
**"Which is Good for You!"**
I will make your life better by reducing legislation, government overreach and provide effective use of your tax money. I am asking for you to support me.
---
| | [ Donate to America ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=4152827.4643.1.c18966f1ffd47c450504abc4d2b9b0da)
---
And sign my petition to be on the Primary Ballot (cd9 voters).
---
| | [ Sign my Petition at AZSOS ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=4152827.4644.1.6e024bbddff3f3473ef7af63af07f55b)
---
We need to redirect our taxpayer money to help the American people such as our veterans, our homeless, our infrastructure. I will support voter integrity, term limits, secure borders, balance our budget and reduce the debt for our children.
# Congress Continues to Fail Us.
# I plan to correct this issue.
They Spend more money that what we have.
I’m demanding accountability from Congress.
I will fight to **protect our Constitutional Rights**
and **make Congress accountable**!
---
I will COMMIT and DEVOTE 100% of my time!
---
We can **Win District Nine** and **"Stop the Madness"**.
---
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/261510?id=4152827.4645.1.364dbcc334820b739b9681aadb98cc34)
---
**Dave Giles**
Candidate
United States Congress
Arizona's 9th District

name: Jay Jones
subject: I need your help sending Schuyler back to the House of Delegates
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Jay Jones
body:
| | | **[](https://act.myngp.com/el/AE5f2_0byiCAirWJKOb0cyz-0e-yv1XtunD9Er947P4=/Cq7E2rgkqXSCgAjoLsud9-ZZ7NGUXmX7pba_d7uhVj8=)**
---
Friend -- I've been fortunate to serve alongside my friend Delegate Schuyler VanValkenburg since I was elected to the House of Delegates in 2017. I've seen firsthand what an effective legislator he is and just how much he cares about the people of Virginia. Together, we've worked to better our Commonwealth -- but his seat is on the line. We need Schuyler in order to continue the good work we've done since winning the majority. [**That 's why we all have to do our part to re-elect Schuyler this November.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AE5f2_0byiCAirWJKOb0cyz-0e-yv1XtunD9Er947P4=/UI9-RIJtK0kG-2saMZu-eQlXo93B-ULEUa0NMgP5Dyg=) The Republican State Leadership Committee is going after Schuyler, recently launching an attack ad against him on TV and funding his Trumpian opponent. We must step up today to help Schuyler compete with the GOP's endless resources! [**I hope you 'll consider splitting a donation between me and Schuyler today. A contribution of $10, $25, or even $50 will go a long way toward re-electing Schuyler and keeping Virginia blue!**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AE5f2_0byiCAirWJKOb0cyz-0e-yv1XtunD9Er947P4=/UI9-RIJtK0kG-2saMZu-eQlXo93B-ULEUa0NMgP5Dyg=) If we all work together, I believe we can win this. [**Help me make that happen.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/AE5f2_0byiCAirWJKOb0cyz-0e-yv1XtunD9Er947P4=/UI9-RIJtK0kG-2saMZu-eQlXo93B-ULEUa0NMgP5Dyg=) Thank you for everything you do, Jay

name: MalcolmKenyatta.com
subject: Rocky Balboa + my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
#

Hey friend,
Thanks a bunch for everything you're doing for my dad's campaign!
I know it means a whole lot to him that you stood with him last month and made September a big win.
As a Philly girl (like our First Lady Jill Biden), one of my favorite movies is Rocky, of course.
You've seen it, right? The hometown-loving underdog defies all odds and becomes the people's champion. When you think about it, that's my dad's story, too!
Nobody thought he'd win his first race, but he proved them wrong. And with your help, we're going to do it again!
**I keep hearing my dad say this fight is for working people. I'm just a dog, so I'm not sure what that means, but I've got my boxing gloves on — so I'm ready.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36842313/309310187/-360183459?refcode2=81f8da73-c822-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em211001-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWY4ZGE3My1jODIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VznbXKwAB6Jg71QeFZSSmPO_4lRLjkhVhouWk2IQR8Y=)
And I hope you are, too!
Thanks again for all you do,
Cleo
Friend, if you're able, please consider making a donation to fuel our grassroots movement for Pennsylvania.
**2022 will be here before we know it, and it's so important that we show strong momentum going into our official election year.**
Anything you can give will go a long way since we're powered 100% by grassroots donations from working folks.
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36842315/309310190/-360183459?refcode2=81f8da73-c822-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&refcode=em211001-1-c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MWY4ZGE3My1jODIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VznbXKwAB6Jg71QeFZSSmPO_4lRLjkhVhouWk2IQR8Y=)**
We appreciate your support!

name: Jim DeMint
subject: American Embassy in the Swamp
body:
Fellow Patriot:

If you ever wonder why we need the Conservative
Partnership, just turn on the news. Everything is inside-out and
upside-down.

Take, for example, the recent influx of Haitian
immigrants in Texas. According to the mainstream media, the news
wasn't that the Biden Administration let thousands of illegal
immigrants into the country. No, the "official" narrative was a
lie about border patrol officers on horseback - conducted by
reporters who can't tell the difference between reins and whips.

However ignorant, these narrative-writing elites
still run the circus in Washington, DC. Their influence is in the
corporate lobbyists, congressional leaders, special interests,
and the media covering them. They all have one thing in common -
they hate conservatives.

Our job here at CPI is to bring America's values to
America's capital. We give conservative members, staff, and
activists from around the country a headquarters away from the
temptations and scorn of the woke socialists.

"This feels like the American embassy in the swamp
of DC," says CPI Chief Operating Officer Wesley Denton in a new

clean_body: Fellow Patriot: If you ever wonder why we need the Conservative Partnership, just turn on the news. Everything is inside-out and upside-down. Take, for example, the recent influx of Haitian immigrants in Texas. According to the mainstream media, the news wasn't that the Biden Administration let thousands of illegal immigrants into the country. No, the "official" narrative was a lie about border patrol officers on horseback - conducted by reporters who can't tell the difference between reins and whips. However ignorant, these narrative-writing elites still run the circus in Washington, DC. Their influence is in the corporate lobbyists, congressional leaders, special interests, and the media covering them. They all have one thing in common - they hate conservatives. Our job here at CPI is to bring America's values to America's capital. We give conservative members, staff, and activists from around the country a headquarters away from the temptations and scorn of the woke socialists. ## **🍂 IT’S TIME TO FALL INTO ACTION! 🍁**
_Fall is here and so are all of our resources needed to help YOU breeze right through training to become a local leader._ _We’ve got the live trainings, courses, articles, and on-demand tools that will help you organize your campaign._ _So grab a flannel shirt, your favorite warm drink, and cozy up with one of this week’s live trainings._

RSVP now to learn how to use your personal story to connect with the constituents you are running to represent.

| | Wow, Peter! What a month — we hit our goal just before midnight last night.

We had a successful launch, bringing in over 300 grassroots donations.

I am incredibly proud of the movement we are building and humbled to have you on my team.

Together we are proving we have the momentum to defeat Republicans’ special interests, bring our community’s values to Congress, and elect Colorado’s first Latina representative.

Thank you so much for your support.

Vamos!

Dr. Yadira Caraveo

name: John Cranley
subject: Snapshots of our campaign so far
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
| Hi friend, First off, let me say thank you. Grassroots supporters like you from Ohio and beyond once again stepped up to support our campaign. With your help, we met our September fundraising goal. My team and I couldn’t be more grateful! The road to flipping Ohio blue is long, but as we enter the third month of our campaign, I think it’s important to look back at how far we’ve already come in building this movement together. body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36849642/309338834/-1739877693?refcode=20211001_SA_MF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM4MmM5Ni1kOTIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FZYKw4gtAJXjenARWM-e0dHlflloKbU0FHnMDbdblfM=) Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. **Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? clean_body: | | | = Friend, My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse. As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it. Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race. = = Now, let’s not kid ourselves: the battle to unseat Greene and other Trump-Republicans like Glenn Youngkin will be difficult. She is the new darling of the Radical Right media machine -- and she’s backed by millions in special-interest money. But one thing I’ve learned throughout my career in service is that when the mission is this important, you have to stay focused. = Together we can accomplish great things, Marcus Flowers = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Charlie Crist
subject: a story about my grandfather, opportunity, and Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
my story is an American story |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36850332/309341221/-1091140578?refcode=20211001_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjE0ZmI2OC1kYjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y6UjmMdq1_uCoFJpQSzsA2hXPsWKMeiCsVkNXLbtZc=)
---
Friend, my story is a story about opportunity.

My grandfather immigrated to the United States in 1914 from the island of Cyprus. Though he arrived on Ellis Island with only pennies in his pocket, he was full of determination to succeed in his new country. He started out making five dollars a month shining shoes and then cleaned clothes for years so that my father, Charles Crist, Sr., could go to college and become a doctor, ultimately raising four kids.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36850334/309341223/-1091140578?refcode=20211001_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjE0ZmI2OC1kYjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y6UjmMdq1_uCoFJpQSzsA2hXPsWKMeiCsVkNXLbtZc=)
---
When I was three, my parents moved to St. Pete, and I grew up attending public schools in Florida’s “Sunshine City.” In high school I was the starting quarterback for our football team, and I later played football at Wake Forest University before transferring to Florida State.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36850335/309341225/-1091140578?refcode=20211001_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjE0ZmI2OC1kYjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y6UjmMdq1_uCoFJpQSzsA2hXPsWKMeiCsVkNXLbtZc=)
---
After college, I earned my law degree and started my career. Over the years, I’ve had the honor of serving my fellow Floridians as state senator, attorney general, governor, and congressman -- but I’ve never forgotten that I stand on the shoulders of giants.

I often stop to think about all the opportunities provided to my grandfather, an immigrant to this country who didn’t speak English. And I also think about the values my mom and dad taught me right here in Pinellas County.

**[These opportunities and values are unique to our Florida, and I’m running for governor to protect and expand upon them for future generations -- to build a Florida for All! Will you join with us in that effort by donating today to my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36850336/309341226/-1091140578?refcode=20211001_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjE0ZmI2OC1kYjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y6UjmMdq1_uCoFJpQSzsA2hXPsWKMeiCsVkNXLbtZc=)**

Thanks for reading,
Charlie Crist

[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36850341/309341227/-1091140578?refcode=20211001_f_1_fl&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjE0ZmI2OC1kYjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Y6UjmMdq1_uCoFJpQSzsA2hXPsWKMeiCsVkNXLbtZc=)
---

body:
It was a busy week at the Indiana Statehouse and, as of this writing, the work is still going on as legislative leaders finalize the.. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/the-resiliency-of-hoosiers-470878?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Happy October**_ It was a busy week at the Indiana Statehouse and, as of this writing, the work is still going on as legislative leaders finalize the once-a-decade redistricting process. I’ve used this space the past couple of weeks to applaud the legislature for the process they undertook and had the opportunity to do so again with an op-ed in the Indianapolis Star. The link to the op-ed is below.

As we see what functional, conservative leadership is accomplishing for Hoosiers here at home, it is a stark contrast to what went on this week in Washington D.C. The week started off with Joe Biden, his handlers, Nancy Pelosi and a large chunk of the leftwing establishment and their national media allies telling us, with a straight face, that Joe Biden’s $3.5 **__trillion__ **massive spending plan actually costs nothing! And why do they say it costs nothing? Because instead of borrowing money, they’re just going to raise your taxes to pay for everything. Democrats in Washington think your money is the government’s and that things only have a cost when the government needs to borrow. It’s a bold strategy. Also, let’s not kid ourselves, not only will they raise your taxes, on top of the rising costs of everything else, they’ll still borrow billions to for socialist spending. Thankfully, Republicans and a few responsible Democrats are holding the line against this monstrosity.

Thanks
Kyle

_**Photo:** Chairman Hupfer talks about redistricting on Louisville's WDRB earlier this week._
---
|
---
| | **Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**
---
|
---
| **_Building One Indiana For All_**
**Governor Holcomb **joined Pacers Sports & Entertainment to celebrate the renaming of Gainbridge Fieldhouse. It might go by a new name, but Gainbridge Fieldhouse is still the home of the Pacers and Fever, right in the heart of basketball country.

**_Photos:_**_ Gov. Holcomb speaking at the Gainbridge Fieldhouse event._
---
|
---
| _**Chairman Hupfer Op-Ed**_ Chairman Hupfer recently penned an op-ed for the Indy Star detailing Indiana Democrats' false claims about the new redistricting maps. Read his piece here: [https://www.indystar.com/story/opinion/2021/09/28/indiana-not-gerrymandered-voters-chose-republicans/5831385001/](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=069814f846&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
|
---
|
---
| _**Diversity Series Applications**_ Applications are now open for the second class of the Indiana Republican Diversity Leadership Series. [Click here to apply](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=982ccc567d&e=1acd9bb3d6).
---
|
---
| _**Upcoming Republican Events**_
[October 5](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=87dc8fc09a&e=1acd9bb3d6): Harrison County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 5](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e9d8ff4868&e=1acd9bb3d6): Madison County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 6](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=0135b6cdef&e=1acd9bb3d6): Gibson County Lincoln Day Dinner
[October 7](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d1d61da18e&e=1acd9bb3d6): Boone County Lincoln Day Dinner

**Congressman Greg Pence** [will protect the sanctity of life](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2a79af3fe2&e=1acd9bb3d6)
**Congressman Larry Bucshon**[criticizes Biden's Afghanistan withdrawal](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=31eeb3bb52&e=1acd9bb3d6)

| | Hi Peter, I know you’ve received a ton of emails from my team and me this past week asking for your help to reach our $50,000 goal as we closed out the quarter. I just got the news from our team that -- because of you -- we not only hit our goal, we outpaced it. This grassroots team stepped up when we needed it the most -- and for that, I am overwhelmed with gratitude. And fired up. Your support means we’re out there each week knocking on doors, organizing, and registering voters, everywhere from parking lots to backyards. You can feel the momentum growing. Our campaign built on love, hope, and empathy is one step closer to defeating Madison Cawthorn’s divisive and dangerous politics \-- and it’s all thanks to **you.** The months ahead are going to be critical for building up this team so we have the resources to flip NC-11 blue. But for now, I just wanted to say thank you. Having you by my side really makes all of the difference. \-- Jasmine [_**P.S. If you didn’t have a chance to donate to our FEC goal, it would mean the world to me if you could chip in today to ensure we can keep building our grassroots movement.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36851264/309343179/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211001_FR_EOQThanks_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGQwZDdlYy1kZDIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=taWi6GbmVC6imuibWNDXQ8bKKb-TpdOHQNePhB5vCyM=) | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36851265/309343180/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211001_FR_EOQThanks_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGQwZDdlYy1kZDIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=taWi6GbmVC6imuibWNDXQ8bKKb-TpdOHQNePhB5vCyM=)

subject: Thanks so much, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I’m grateful to have you with us. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36851403/309343370/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODM1NzMzMi1kZTIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCFqaJF2xqm-buwo81dVxnBibm6UBeTGaYJDixWfSec=&emci=5236114d-be22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=a8357332-de22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=1049176)
Peter, I owe you another “thank you.” There hasn’t been a month yet where my finance team has had to tell me that we fell short of a fundraising goal, and that’s all because generous grassroots supporters like you know how critical our administration’s work is for North Carolina. I’d like to give each of you a call to tell you how grateful I am, but with more than **_800_** donations in September alone, that might be a little bit hard. **If you ask me, we have the best grassroots team in the country.** Peter, if you feel there’s more you’re able to do to support Team Cooper and our mission to elect Democrats up and down the North Carolina ballot ahead of the 2022 elections, **[consider making a recurring monthly donation of any size.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36851404/309343371/435245919?refcode=em_RC_FR_TY_100121_b_L1&amount=5&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODM1NzMzMi1kZTIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NCFqaJF2xqm-buwo81dVxnBibm6UBeTGaYJDixWfSec=)** By committing to a small-dollar contribution each month, you’re helping our team plan ahead — it’s always easier to plan to invest funds when we already know. **[$5, $25, or any monthly amount that’s right for you would go a long way. clean_body: I’m grateful to have you with us. | Peter, I owe you another “thank you.” There hasn’t been a month yet where my finance team has had to tell me that we fell short of a fundraising goal, and that’s all because generous grassroots supporters like you know how critical our administration’s work is for North Carolina. I’d like to give each of you a call to tell you how grateful I am, but with more than 800 donations in September alone, that might be a little bit hard. If you ask me, we have the best grassroots team in the country. Peter, if you feel there’s more you’re able to do to support Team Cooper and our mission to elect Democrats up and down the North Carolina ballot ahead of the 2022 elections, = By committing to a small-dollar contribution each month, you’re helping our team plan ahead — it’s always easier to plan to invest funds when we already know. = = = = Thank you again, Roy = | = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. name: =?utf-8?Q?Allison=20Russo?=
subject: It’s the LAST WEEKEND before voting begins!
body:
We need 46 more shifts to cover this weekend, | | | |
---
| | | Happy October !

The air is crisp, the leaves are turning, and folks will begin voting in just 4 days! We only have **one weekend left before early voting begins** in the OH-15 special election, and we can't afford to fall behind on our voter contact goals now. We've knocked on over 30,000 doors so far, but we have a big push coming up this weekend and we won't be able to reach it without you. **, can you sign up for a volunteer shift this weekend?_We need to schedule another 46 shifts TODAY to meet our goal._**
---
|
---
| [TALK TO VOTERS BEFORE VOTING BEGINS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=58a3bd9f59&e=400a181d5a "TALK TO VOTERS BEFORE VOTING BEGINS")
---
| Research shows that field programs are especially important in special elections, where turnout is typically low and there is not incumbency advantage. **But we can't take advantage of the unique dynamics of this special election without your help.**
---
|
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=eb746abf52&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Talk to voters in your neighborhood](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=95e706a714&e=400a181d5a)
Join Allison Russo and local Democratic candidates across the 15th Distrist this (and every) weekend to talk to voters about the special election. We have just over 5 weeks to go until Election Day, so there is no "later!"

RSVP: [Grove City](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=b270aef200&e=400a181d5a) | [Pickerington](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d74d1f565b&e=400a181d5a) | [Hilliard](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1e5d7f58dd&e=400a181d5a) | [Lancaster](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=c8277bea81&e=400a181d5a) | [Athens](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=9772ef4729&e=400a181d5a) | [London](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=ef272368aa&e=400a181d5a) | [UA](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=babb8f1d23&e=400a181d5a) | [Nelsonville](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=d58f5af187&e=400a181d5a) | [Grandview](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1db23c88fd&e=400a181d5a)
|
---
|
---
|
### _FEATURED EVENTS THIS WEEKEND:_
---
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=aff534535e&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Veterans & Military Caucus Canvass](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=2339d853b1&e=400a181d5a)
Join State Rep. Allison Russo, the ODP Veterans & Military Community Caucus, and fellow veterans to knock on doors and talk with voters in Grove City this Saturday.
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=8106157300&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Nelsonville Community Canvass](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=45cdb9c2e8&e=400a181d5a)
Join your neighbors in Nelsonville to knock on doors for Allison this Saturday and Sunday!
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1793eeb97c&e=400a181d5a)
---
### RSVP: [Veterans ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=9f6152ec56&e=400a181d5a)[& Military Community Caucus Canvass](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=a4829e92b8&e=400a181d5a)
Join Veteran and State Rep. Adam Miller and fellow veterans to knock on doors and talk with voters on behalf of Allison Russo.
| [ ](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=29b1ffcfcb&e=400a181d5a)
---
### SIGN UP: [Adopt a Precinct](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=76ed87d403&e=400a181d5a)
When you adopt a precinct, you become a trusted local messenger for the campaign in your community. **This is a great way to keep canvassing safely during Covid-19 if you aren't comfortable with big launches. **You can adopt a precinct on your own or claim one with a friend! We also do group trainings for those who want their organization to claim a couple precincts! _The deadline to adopt a precinct is October 5th_.
| [SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0d0345b6cf&e=400a181d5a "SEE ALL UPCOMING EVENTS")
---
| |
### _**We need you to help spread the word, .**_
_**Can you forward this email to ten neighbors, get a group of friends together to come to a meet and greet, or help us talk to voters soon?**_
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=53cd5fc79b&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1dde97e9e5&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=0da1f3228e&e=400a181d5a)
---
| | [](AllisonRusso.com)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2021 RUSSO FOR CONGRESS, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website or a campaign event.

**Our mailing address is:**
RUSSO FOR CONGRESS545 E Town StColumbus, OH 43215-4801
[Add us to your address book](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/vcard?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=145de17775) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://Allisonrusso.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=8a3818e62f1e6e7a398f3ef29&id=1655de56ed&e=400a181d5a&c=145de17775).

---

name: NH GOP
subject: We're only one week away from Amos Tuck 2021 with Senator Tim Scott
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Today is your LAST CHANCE to get tickets before the price goes up!
Derek,

We are only one week away from our 2021 Amos Tuck dinner with Senator Tim Scott!
Today is the final day to get your tickets at the early-bird price of $100, before ticket prices go up tonight at midnight.
[Reserve your tickets today](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Famostuckdinner/1/0100017c3c23dc7a-8caedaa0-d128-491b-97ac-ae6270b0927a-000000/1iLa9dw5YWEmTt1gjeAoTHE2iZ0=238)
If you would like to attend, make sure to get your tickets TODAY, before the price goes up.
Senator Scott is one of the brightest and most influential minds in the Republican party. We are extremely excited to be welcoming him to New Hampshire for our largest and most significant fundraiser of 2021.
We hope to see you there!

[Reserve your tickets for Amos Tuck 2021](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Famostuckdinner/2/0100017c3c23dc7a-8caedaa0-d128-491b-97ac-ae6270b0927a-000000/o516Hcd8yUcNr5ZbjC2dVeFfR2Y=238)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: Hi, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Say farewell to Trump's legacy.
|
---
| | | Say farewell to Trump's legacy.

It's Marco Rubio. **I MISSED the goal for my first End of Quarter deadline** since my Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised me and now I'm reaching out to you..
one.
last.
time.
Florida's last Senate race was decided by 0.1% and my race is currently tied! If Dems take control of Florida, Trump's legacy is as good as gone - OBLITERATED! Rush in $18 to the most high stakes Senate race before our extended midnight deadline >>>

---
**[<< RUSH IN $18 >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58451274:68P35o2N6:m:1:3253819041:DC4918E322808079451F2B339600E601:r "<< RUSH IN $18 >>")

We can't afford for you to ignore this call for help! Time is running out quickly, please don't let Trump and me down!

| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Peter, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

Marco Rubio

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Stop forced COVID vax on campus
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2emb1gvb6h44p3gngkjjosidj822u64e7r5ujho_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi68oj2chh2bs) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zepthod0g939maa1dkluq95jc9o0qm3egi48tmtg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi68oj2chh2bs) [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf3occud32vdgdknp9k5upho55ke0fhf3hsmqulg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi68oj2chh2bs) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztmspsd0jp56lbauacfnj6vth3gl6232pj38n8jo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi68oj2chh2bs) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students —the least affected by the disease — must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcccpl4c021p60ccknufu317gdtqgmjd85p60fo0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi68oj2chh2bs) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl3j2m0ilnn43ds9s32j6a29trc3bu4vdmaitk7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi68oj2chh2bs) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zibe82kfubpefutuugrq1levfn5n3aroe1472prg_)

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq04k56b218ucudde5dbsqajj8oggm7i6ad5j0po_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi68oj2chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: One in Eight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=c869218659&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | This month, we take time to remember that 1 in 8 women in the United States will be diagnosed with breast cancer in her lifetime along with 1 in 833 men. And it’s important to remember that breast cancer does not discriminate – it affects both trans men and women and those that identify as non-binary.

Early detection is the key to prevention. But organizations that have been a lifeline for women are under fire.

Planned Parenthood is the only source of care for many individuals, making these health centers an irreplaceable component of this country’s health care system. In recent years, 41% of patients rely on a family planning clinic as their only recent source for health care services like contraception, testing and treatment for sexually transmitted infections, lifesaving cancer screenings, and safe, legal abortion. At least one in five women has relied on a Planned Parenthood health center for care in her lifetime.

Each year, Planned Parenthood provides 300,000 breast exams, more than 270,000 Pap tests, and birth control to nearly 2 million people. Fifty-six percent (56%) of Planned Parenthood health centers are in health professional shortage areas, rural or medically underserved areas. Planned Parenthood health centers provide primary and preventive health care to many who otherwise would have nowhere to turn for family planning care.

**[As your state representative, I will always stand with Planned Parenthood and all community resources for free and affordable life-saving healthcare. Please help me get to Harrisburg.](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=ec85dee26e&e=3f8e2ea1e3)**

In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=6db0815c1e&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: Diego Rodriguez
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Diego for AG
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36860767/309356213/-1716317403?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzJmZjNiMi1lNzIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8fQrVIIUo-Ppiux4V9w6p6eIlSschKjJm9yD37zKs0=&emci=79e38ad8-e522-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=ac2ff3b2-e722-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=10950315)
---
Hi friend — I wanted to reach out to thank you for your support in the buildup to our quarterly deadline! Our campaign for Attorney General just launched, so having you on my team in these early months makes all the difference.

**Because of your generosity, we _outdid_ our ambitious goal of 100 new donors.** We showed Arizona that our campaign to bring transparency, integrity, and accountability back to the office means _business_.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36860769/309356215/2127152568?refcode=X_100121_ThankYou&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzJmZjNiMi1lNzIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=L8fQrVIIUo-Ppiux4V9w6p6eIlSschKjJm9yD37zKs0=)
---

Working for the people of Arizona in the State House has been the greatest honor. But taking that to the Attorney General's office will be even greater. **I'm glad you're on my team for this fight.**

Together we can build a better, more just Arizona for everyone.

Thank you again!

_\-- Diego_

**Rep. Diego Rodriguez is running for Attorney General to be the People's Attorney, focused on our needs instead of partisan stunts. As a lifelong Democrat, a prosecutor, a defense attorney, and now as a State Representative, Diego is the most experienced and most qualified candidate that we can trust to fight for our rights.**
