name: Marisa Wood
subject: Tell Kevin McCarthy to stop stonewalling.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36861060/309357227/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDNhNjgzNC1lOTIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_j4Mi-2qw7hWoCm6cxFpXZBpqHmbDIqg98chztCbGY=)
I'm so grateful, friend.

Thanks to you and thousands of other supporters across California and all 50 states, I'm thrilled to share that we surpassed our first full FEC end-of-quarter fundraising goal. _I couldn't do this without you. Thank you._

This is important because it proves that we have what it takes to defeat Kevin McCarthy, and it's increasingly urgent that we do so. Here's the latest on the infrastructure bill that our community so desperately needs:
**_"I think the majority, an overwhelming amount of Republicans, are going to vote NO."_**
-GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy
Kevin clearly hasn't been on our public roads, highways, bridges, or used broadband lately. If he had, he'd know there's NO excuse for our nation's crumbling infrastructure.

I see it everyday here in the Central Valley. We're one of the poorest areas in the state. We could definitely use this needed upgrade, and it would provide good jobs to working people in our community.

**Mark my words: We'll defeat McCarthy at the ballot box next November, and we can make a real difference, especially if we come together and make our voices heard. That's why I'm asking:**

**[Will you ADD YOUR NAME to my petition calling on Kevin McCarthy to stop stonewalling the Democrats' infrastructure bill? He needs to hear from us, today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36861062/309357228/-2031805629?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDNhNjgzNC1lOTIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_j4Mi-2qw7hWoCm6cxFpXZBpqHmbDIqg98chztCbGY=&emci=0c3a6834-e922-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=0d3a6834-e922-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=21170704)**
| **[Add your name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36861063/309357231/-2031805629?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDNhNjgzNC1lOTIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x_j4Mi-2qw7hWoCm6cxFpXZBpqHmbDIqg98chztCbGY=&emci=0c3a6834-e922-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=0d3a6834-e922-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=21170704)**

Thanks again for all of your support last quarter. I'm excited to see what we do next.

More soon,

Marisa Wood
Teacher for US Congress

If he had, he'd know there's NO excuse for our nation's crumbling infrastructure. I see it everyday here in the Central Valley. We're one of the poorest areas in the state. We could definitely use this needed upgrade, and it would provide good jobs to working people in our community. Mark my words: We'll defeat McCarthy at the ballot box next November, and we can make a real difference, especially if we come together and make our voices heard. That's why I'm asking: | Thanks again for all of your support last quarter. I'm excited to see what we do next. More soon, Marisa Wood Teacher for US Congress = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Marisa Wood for Congress PO Box 12103 Bakersfield, CA 93389 United States

Peter, we know it’s been a busy week... and you’ve gotten _a lot_ of email.

Now, it’s up to us to win back the House and Senate Majorities and Stop Joe Biden’s march towards socialism. _Can we count on your support, Peter?_ ](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9ID_zY5G8o3YNoeszBlfMCm0W_cHOFnnvD6xmdK49vx3OL37YwAi6zgJDOValfT94ve_DHdORBdRuG1InMPvjvR_LoXZ0JjhhSr95SMuV0EQ_mN5cIqptjuHh4dVAqI4Fa7RS4VGcJvkZ5YnsYa6AvwwPMukx_jirANAtUZT0BBxMfsmHqKPuKDEzn8DmeGTR&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=625451453040721274_1&n=10) | | [Contribute Now](https://www.nc.gop/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYoX9ls6uHz6nseaLc9yeOc5gJTrfTj8QMzrK5BHQBzw9ID_zY5G8o3YNoeszBlfMCm0W_cHOFnnvD6xmdK49vx2dhjFmsvrRPyEouXBg56jPwsYuBuFrbssgw1Ea3sff-s6GVtKMt-YCxOnznzuGBgQrM7Q-H9-l03NXe1swd-D1T5RAcT5VTpKoczLOULWMeMaeLW55xlu3KRMIiE3DKdPfTyrJV54kdNav_9W5eHlR&e=f30dc52ea6b3f0fa359c0052b3984e35&utm_source=ncgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=625451453040721274_1&n=11)

We know we email you a lot, Peter. That’s because we rely on the support of Grassroots Republicans like you to sustain our efforts! The Democrats will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to defeat us, and we can’t afford to let them win. The best way you can help is [1] by subscribing to our emails and text messages and [2] by chipping in a few dollars as often as you can. We appreciate you!
Text JOIN to 21011 to receive mobile alerts and help the NCGOP! Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. Message frequency may vary. Msg&data rates may apply. body:
his 2021 strategy pays off. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4miV04tp4Fy6FnycaH8AsjDGBcX5Z1lWO1Zf1qJ89adN32G1f9NvLusDmT26ew_rA1jIJXcln9YmNrOkBdK04pEDh878jnUPdGzxusFJJ-W8gu0mh8-RAiWr7mEhXpwoHNMFq4bpIcwI8HyfNGrk7yGpVj5a82DyIXi0DksS_SCtMpjLvvagqE4u1cpOnEkT0dUVOuCyS8-w3jQjPUOv1sXo4Bljs9QPXNwuCucktnZhQtm5PURSCPqBgMumn_R7FHlvi2LWeDtx_krzzIxYaw_MXDeJ9uvEL8RNo6FHcgztaankP6oDbiHb2EedeI6Grgx/3fs/VEHq65JmTVy6UCIWywCVsg/h0/05wRyNxvOCieuWXOwiZCuyuEHnBOec-dpMHbvGNMb7E)
Despite the damage Donald Trump did to our country, despite his big lie and instigating the January 6 insurrection, despite being impeached -- _twice_ \-- Glenn Youngkin, the Republican candidate for Governor of Virginia, just endorsed Trump’s 2024 campaign for President.

This is a HUGE deal.

Trump’s plan for 2021 and the 2022 midterms was to get his hand-picked candidates elected across the country -- _**so then they’d turn around and help him get elected in 2024.**_

[**We can’t afford to let Trump gain momentum going into 2024. name: Quaye Quartey
subject: I’m so thankful for this team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Quartey for Congress
body:
|
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36861972/309360633/72349127?refcode=jqq_headerlogo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTUyN2Q4MC1lYTIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DED9biTJyKnG6ZGOc8Q1f5vtu__S5V5jGTsIxsF7jys=)

| | This team is incredible. Just before midnight last night, our campaign surpassed our end-of-quarter fundraising goal because of committed grassroots supporters like you. Thank you for believing in our campaign, and thank you for entrusting me to be the person best fit to represent you and our community moving forward. There’s still a long way to go, but together we’re building the strong, people-powered movement it’s going to take to defeat Mike Garcia and his MAGA-funded campaign. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Good morning — and thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I wanted to take a moment this morning to reach out to say thank you.
#

Friends,
I wanted to take a moment this morning to reach out to say thank you.
We sent quite a few emails and text messages in advance of last night’s FEC fundraising deadlines, and I appreciate you reading them.
We’re powering this campaign in a very unique way: with a large number of grassroots, individual donations from people like you chipping in what they can, when they can, to move our country forward and make sure Arizona has a senator who will put partisanship aside to do what’s right.
I’m very proud of that fact. And I hope you are too.
So again, thank you. Your energy is helping fuel our campaign, and it’s contagious. I have no doubt that if we keep working together as a team, we’ll win this thing and hold this seat so I can keep delivering for Arizona families and our nation. And with everything our country is facing right now, that means a lot.
Thank you,
Mark Kelly

* * *

**Please take a moment to add your name to say you endorse Mark Kelly’s re-election to the United States Senate in Arizona. Together, we’re building a grassroots movement that will keep Mark in the Senate fighting for all of us.**
**[ENDORSE MARK](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-endorse-oct?source=em211001-1-15&t=1&akid=1464%2E6688874%2EDH9KSy)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=1464%2E6688874%2EDH9KSy).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. name: Andy Beshear
subject: I'm running for re-election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I want you to be one of the first to know Hi Peter,

When I launched my campaign for governor in 2018, I knew it was going to be an uphill battle. But we focused on doing right by Kentuckians, improving access to health care, supporting our teachers, creating good-paying jobs, and just basic decency.

And we shocked the whole country by winning an upset victory. We did it against an avalanche of big outside money trying to prop up the most unpopular governor in the country, who bullied rather than governed -- but who enjoyed the huge advantages of incumbency and partisan lean.

We won that race by treating everyone with respect and dignity, understanding that every community matters, and organizing neighborhood by neighborhood, street by street. We knocked on doors that hadn't seen a Democratic campaign in years -- more than one million, in fact.

Despite all the outside money, the false attacks, and divisive rhetoric, our shared Kentucky values of decency and looking out for each other won the day.

This was a huge grassroots victory. **Thanks to your support, we came together, beat the odds, and sent a message that Kentucky values transcend partisanship. So, Peter, I want you to be one of the first to know that today, I filed paperwork to begin the process of running for re-election.**

I continue to see the values of fairness, honesty, hard work, and doing right by our neighbors -- the same Kentucky values I was raised on -- reflected across our Commonwealth. And I know we can win this re-election fight by highlighting the real results we are delivering for people.

Since taking office, we've tackled the opioid crisis, restored voting rights, and protected health care access for nearly 100,000 Kentuckians -- all while working with leaders on both sides of the aisle to get the job done. We've implemented our Better Kentucky plan to clean up our water supply, improve internet access, and provide Kentucky students the world-class public education they deserve. And we've created thousands of family-supporting jobs all over the Commonwealth.

When the COVID-19 pandemic hit, we did everything possible to keep Kentuckians out of harm's way, save small businesses, and protect essential workers. We put people over politics and made unpopular decisions to help keep Kentuckians safe.

And now, even in the middle of this global pandemic, we've had our best economic year in recent history. We're creating more jobs with better wages than ever before.

There's still so much work to do. But by coming together again and leaning on our values, I'm confident that we can continue fighting for teachers and our public schools. We can take on the opioid crisis and keep every community across Kentucky safe. We can continue to expand affordable health care and lower prescription drug costs. We can prioritize economic recovery and defeat COVID-19. We can make Kentucky the best it can be by putting families first and investing in our communities.

I'm excited for you to be a part of this team. If you're ready to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, I want you on board. **[There's so much more to accomplish, and I'll need you by my side to do it -- add your name now to be one of the first to join our team>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36862235/309361433/-1810697182?ms=em21_211001_L1OOS1_adv_gq_geoost_ndr_AB_ettx&source=em21_211001_L1OOS1_adv_gq_geoost_ndr_AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211001_L1OOS1_adv_gq_geoost_ndr_AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmUxY2I5OS1lYjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SqthprsWN3t4_zGQmBYuvQ2WOu3DrUYJAb1m6Oqgbcc=&emci=49990cdc-d522-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=6be1cb99-eb22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=1437603)** [JOIN THE TEAM](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36862238/309361434/-1810697182?ms=em21_211001_L1OOS1_adv_gq_geoost_ndr_AB_ettx&source=em21_211001_L1OOS1_adv_gq_geoost_ndr_AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211001_L1OOS1_adv_gq_geoost_ndr_AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmUxY2I5OS1lYjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SqthprsWN3t4_zGQmBYuvQ2WOu3DrUYJAb1m6Oqgbcc=&emci=49990cdc-d522-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=6be1cb99-eb22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=1437603)
Looking forward to the road ahead,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Chip in today to become a founding donor of Andy's re-election campaign.** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36862240/309361435/-1771530716?refcode=em21_211001_L1OOS1_adv_gq_geoost_ndr_AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211001_L1OOS1_adv_gq_geoost_ndr_AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmUxY2I5OS1lYjIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SqthprsWN3t4_zGQmBYuvQ2WOu3DrUYJAb1m6Oqgbcc=)

clean_body: the last month of the campaign is finally here | | | = | | Derek, Virginians are going to the polls right now and I’m fired up to see democracy in action. But I urgently need your help right now — and here’s why: Last month, we learned that Glenn Youngkin outraised us because he wrote himself huge checks to the tune of 4 million dollars. Plus, poll after poll shows this race is neck and neck. It’s October, and we’re running out of time to turn out the voters we need — if our grassroots team can’t match Glenn Youngkin’s self-funding, we’ll lose all our momentum at the worst possible time. Donald Trump will get a huge win at Virginia’s expense. It’s go time, Derek. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = The good news is we hit our goal for last month. But the bad news is that time is not on our side. Now that Virginians are voting, we need to treat every single day like it’s Election Day — because it is. = Let’s do this, Terry McAuliffe =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

| | **\- October 1****, 2021-** **
To find a march tomorrow near you click[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36862705/309362669/280245776?source=website&FFF.10.01.21.=FFF.10.01.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGE3MDljNC1lZDIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gAM_FCV2oDGh5GY4nUkeH6uhHHuhKnVixmzc6vmpLD4=&emci=1ab1fa28-e221-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=60a709c4-ed22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=4925535).** We've been through this before. Five years ago, Mike Pence signed an anti-abortion bill that prevented women from accessing their health care needs based on detected birth defects. The bill also required burial or cremation - even in cases of miscarriage or stillborn births. This form of extreme partisanship by the INGOP was opposed by 56% of Hoosiers. Regardless, it appears as though Indiana Republicans want to mimic the extreme Texas anti-abortion law during next year's legislative session right here at home. This is why Indiana Democrats will join women and allies across the state and country for tomorrow's Women's March. We hope you join us. **\- Redistricting 2021 Wrap Up -** The Indiana Democratic Party concluded a statewide road trip this week where leaders like State Reps. Chris Campbell, Sheila Klinker, and Ryan Hatfield criticized the broken system that maintains the status quo. The Indiana Republican Party - led by Governor Eric Holcomb - promised a "fair" and "transparent" redistricting process, but even some state Republicans are now criticizing the process too. **Floyd County Republican Party Chairman Jeff Firkins claimed the state GOP didn't[provide counties any local information](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36862706/309362670/-672640382?FFF.10.01.21.=FFF.10.01.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGE3MDljNC1lZDIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gAM_FCV2oDGh5GY4nUkeH6uhHHuhKnVixmzc6vmpLD4=&emci=1ab1fa28-e221-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=60a709c4-ed22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=4925535) on the redistricting process and State Rep. Jerry Torr bragged about how the state Republicans [once supported a nonpartisan redistricting commission](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36862707/309362671/-2066280634?FFF.10.01.21.=FFF.10.01.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGE3MDljNC1lZDIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gAM_FCV2oDGh5GY4nUkeH6uhHHuhKnVixmzc6vmpLD4=&emci=1ab1fa28-e221-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=60a709c4-ed22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=4925535) numerous times before this manipulated process. **There is bipartisan support for fair maps and a fair process, but the INGOP wants to maintain their power by any means necessary - even if it means manipulating a system that helps their self-serving interests and NOT Hoosier families. **\- Indiana Republicans: Putting Their Self-Interests Ahead of State and Federal Laws -** Indiana Republicans have proven time and again to value their own self-interests over creating a better future for Hoosier families. U.S. Congresswoman Victoria Spartz and State Senator Mark Messmer are the latest Republicans to discard their Hoosier values and put their personal financial gain ahead of others. Victoria Spartz was caught violating transparency regulations within the [STOCK Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36862708/309362672/-124648767?FFF.10.01.21.=FFF.10.01.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGE3MDljNC1lZDIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gAM_FCV2oDGh5GY4nUkeH6uhHHuhKnVixmzc6vmpLD4=&emci=1ab1fa28-e221-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=60a709c4-ed22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=4925535) while Mark Messmer was accepting contributions connected to [illegal campaign fundraising schemes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36862709/309362673/-20795024?FFF.10.01.21.=FFF.10.01.21.&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MGE3MDljNC1lZDIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gAM_FCV2oDGh5GY4nUkeH6uhHHuhKnVixmzc6vmpLD4=&emci=1ab1fa28-e221-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=60a709c4-ed22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=4925535). Spartz and Messmer are not alone. Indiana Republicans like Eric Holcomb, Todd Young, Mike Braun, Jim Banks, Greg Pence, and the supermajorities at the statehouse have proven time and again that their Party's extreme partisanship and dangerous agenda comes before a brighter future for Indiana. The INGOP has simply become too extreme for Indiana and they will do anything - like vote to overturn the 2020 presidential election - to stay in power. The time is now to deliver for Hoosier families. By passing the American Rescue Plan and supporting President Joe Biden's Build Back Better agenda, Democrats are delivering better opportunities for Hoosier families and a brighter tomorrow for all of Indiana's 92 counties. Democrats look forward to campaigning on issues like broadband, high-paying jobs, and fully-funding Indiana's public schools during the pivotal 2022 elections. **\- Opportunities -** **\- Hispanic Heritage Month -** **Power of the Black and Brown Vote** ****

clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | \- October 1, 2021- To find a march tomorrow near you click. We've been through this before. Five years ago, Mike Pence signed an anti-abortion bill that prevented women from accessing their health care needs based on detected birth defects. The bill also required burial or cremation - even in cases of miscarriage or stillborn births. This form of extreme partisanship by the INGOP was opposed by 56% of Hoosiers. Regardless, it appears as though Indiana Republicans want to mimic the extreme Texas anti-abortion law during next year's legislative session right here at home. This is why Indiana Democrats will join women and allies across the state and country for tomorrow's Women's March. We hope you join us. \- Redistricting 2021 Wrap Up - The Indiana Democratic Party concluded a statewide road trip this week where leaders like State Reps. Chris Campbell, Sheila Klinker, and Ryan Hatfield criticized the broken system that maintains the status quo. The Indiana Republican Party - led by Governor Eric Holcomb - promised a "fair" and "transparent" redistricting process, but even some state Republicans are now criticizing the process too. Floyd County Republican Party Chairman Jeff Firkins claimed the state GOP didn't on the redistricting process and State Rep. Jerry Torr bragged about how the state Republicans numerous times before this manipulated process. There is bipartisan support for fair maps and a fair process, but the INGOP wants to maintain their power by any means necessary - even if it means manipulating a system that helps their self-serving interests and NOT Hoosier families. \- Indiana Republicans: Putting Their Self-Interests Ahead of State and Federal Laws - Indiana Republicans have proven time and again to value their own self-interests over creating a better future for Hoosier families. U.S. Congresswoman Victoria Spartz and State Senator Mark Messmer are the latest Republicans to discard their Hoosier values and put their personal financial gain ahead of others. Victoria Spartz was caught violating transparency regulations within the while Mark Messmer was accepting contributions connected to . Spartz and Messmer are not alone. Indiana Republicans like Eric Holcomb, Todd Young, Mike Braun, Jim Banks, Greg Pence, and the supermajorities at the statehouse have proven time and again that their Party's extreme partisanship and dangerous agenda comes before a brighter future for Indiana. The INGOP has simply become too extreme for Indiana and they will do anything - like vote to overturn the 2020 presidential election - to stay in power. The time is now to deliver for Hoosier families. By passing the American Rescue Plan and supporting President Joe Biden's Build Back Better agenda, Democrats are delivering better opportunities for Hoosier families and a brighter tomorrow for all of Indiana's 92 counties. Democrats look forward to campaigning on issues like broadband, high-paying jobs, and fully-funding Indiana's public schools during the pivotal 2022 elections. \- Opportunities - \- Hispanic Heritage Month - Power of the Black and Brown Vote ** State of the Latino Community \- Election Law Update - Join Indiana Democratic Party for a legislative update on election law 2021 session. Please let us know if you need special accommodations by Thursday 10/07/21. name: Tom Nelson
subject: You rock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin**
body:
---
| | **Team, you _rock!_** Thanks to your support, we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. As I don’t take money from corporate PACs and don’t have means to self-fund, your support means so much to me!

_*I got so excited I convinced my digital team to throw in this gif of Angus Young (AC/DC) rocking out._
I launched this campaign because I believe in people-powered movements. We may be up against Wall Street, dark money organizations, Big Pharma, and more, but I know we have what it takes to win.

The momentum we have now is exactly what we need going into election season. A grassroots-fueled campaign with a progressive agenda is exactly what working families all across Wisconsin want — not some out of touch corporate defender who cares more about their next high dollar donation than the thousands of people they’re supposed to be fighting for.

Our biggest challenges are just over the horizon, and I’m so thankful you’re going to be a part of this fight.

Thanks for everything,

Tom

---

Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. clean_body: | | Team, you rock! Thanks to your support, we hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. As I don’t take money from corporate PACs and don’t have means to self-fund, your support means so much to me! I got so excited I convinced my digital team to throw in this gif of Angus Young (AC/DC) rocking out. I launched this campaign because I believe in people-powered movements. We may be up against Wall Street, dark money organizations, Big Pharma, and more, but I know we have what it takes to win. The momentum we have now is exactly what we need going into election season. A grassroots-fueled campaign with a progressive agenda is exactly what working families all across Wisconsin want — not some out of touch corporate defender who cares more about their next high dollar donation than the thousands of people they’re supposed to be fighting for. Our biggest challenges are just over the horizon, and I’m so thankful you’re going to be a part of this fight. Thanks for everything, Tom | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin ** Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

name: Mike Gibbons
subject: September was a Success
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n8uBC4GpLTWgLSWTnSZ3Jjxkp5KYleeYkVlr9sRp6gQshjCo8R_7GHf_g2mlB0EwuVkuf8B5LMT6fZgw6LtbYMu8Q8Ty8JtlHIzjbQ42xeSo46COXGsYpj0VjcpntxqxLIBPdLaE-iWTPZ5ZkKlrIvpTcQqTN_2YCohh9Xihov4x9ZOYk19CDA==&c=1MO9pSaSl_Z_loyiWRs9NiyoEr_5g0BnUOSbASuXT0BlegfFvomRAg==&ch=J4JOr2bgVxkM83aWyRd2CK2TnkRFjHuiuXgOPZXjKa_iR_BMz87pDg==)
---
| Peter,
September was a busy month for #TeamGibbons! We have continued our 88 county tour across the state and are well over halfway through having visited 49 counties!

---
|
---
|
Along the way, I ran into my good friend economist Stephen Moore at the Paulding County Lincoln Day Dinner.

---
|
---
| I appreciate the hospitality of Paulding residents and enjoyed meaningful conversations about how to fix the dysfunction in DC. I will take your input with me to Washington where I will work to stand up to the left and get our fiscal house in order as Ohio's next U.S. Senator. If you have any upcoming events or unique places to visit in your hometown please email [info@gibbonsforohio.com](mailto:info@gibbonsforohio.com) so we can make sure to stop by as we close out the tour!
*** In case you missed it, I was recently featured on Crain's Cleveland Business'[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n8uBC4GpLTWgLSWTnSZ3Jjxkp5KYleeYkVlr9sRp6gQshjCo8R_7GFpP-oBhkwcE2vCCxzECAVQdFfZQrV8syVRs_OmSz9qvtzK0MjTGxu0BGvYYjo_oTqfRUU5kT4g3-xIYnAXBngI3ZC4qHyx37BinCCw8KqamJpNSxMQSIqLB0sFpt3PBnAgeGQlT323Fuay1FhNs5QEbNZgPH0X8erR-pKz3jv1SZ7r-3ikMN-r82Q2wm-pWQzHMfUJQt4BcQT_SmBXFcCU=&c=1MO9pSaSl_Z_loyiWRs9NiyoEr_5g0BnUOSbASuXT0BlegfFvomRAg==&ch=J4JOr2bgVxkM83aWyRd2CK2TnkRFjHuiuXgOPZXjKa_iR_BMz87pDg==)[Landscape Podcast](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n8uBC4GpLTWgLSWTnSZ3Jjxkp5KYleeYkVlr9sRp6gQshjCo8R_7GFpP-oBhkwcE2vCCxzECAVQdFfZQrV8syVRs_OmSz9qvtzK0MjTGxu0BGvYYjo_oTqfRUU5kT4g3-xIYnAXBngI3ZC4qHyx37BinCCw8KqamJpNSxMQSIqLB0sFpt3PBnAgeGQlT323Fuay1FhNs5QEbNZgPH0X8erR-pKz3jv1SZ7r-3ikMN-r82Q2wm-pWQzHMfUJQt4BcQT_SmBXFcCU=&c=1MO9pSaSl_Z_loyiWRs9NiyoEr_5g0BnUOSbASuXT0BlegfFvomRAg==&ch=J4JOr2bgVxkM83aWyRd2CK2TnkRFjHuiuXgOPZXjKa_iR_BMz87pDg==), where we discussed my candidacy and important economic policies that impact the Ohio business community.

---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001n8uBC4GpLTWgLSWTnSZ3Jjxkp5KYleeYkVlr9sRp6gQshjCo8R_7GFpP-oBhkwcE2vCCxzECAVQdFfZQrV8syVRs_OmSz9qvtzK0MjTGxu0BGvYYjo_oTqfRUU5kT4g3-xIYnAXBngI3ZC4qHyx37BinCCw8KqamJpNSxMQSIqLB0sFpt3PBnAgeGQlT323Fuay1FhNs5QEbNZgPH0X8erR-pKz3jv1SZ7r-3ikMN-r82Q2wm-pWQzHMfUJQt4BcQT_SmBXFcCU=&c=1MO9pSaSl_Z_loyiWRs9NiyoEr_5g0BnUOSbASuXT0BlegfFvomRAg==&ch=J4JOr2bgVxkM83aWyRd2CK2TnkRFjHuiuXgOPZXjKa_iR_BMz87pDg==)

name: Jesse Sullivan
subject: term limits in Illinois?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
I’ve got two terrible facts about Illinois politics for you: Did you know that Illinois is one of only a handful of states
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z22127jqdgp9oklt5a174j2bf0q8eif5042uiu4g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi61ob2c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tlhciobcoj7mkr7aojkmgrj0spimlg7epb5chj6fclmcdrr7d9mc4onddtje9rrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb6phgmipm8pti69j38o5ic8r749fg)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc4h4pg8p3gumf3o925lchqsvmq75iqliu8cad2o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi61ob2c1h2bs) | |
---
Friend,

I’ve got two terrible facts about Illinois politics for you:

Did you know that Illinois is one of only a handful of states with **_no term limits_** for state lawmakers and key executive branch officials?

And did you know that Illinois has the **_lowest trust in our government_** of any state?

I don't know about you, friend - but I think the connection here is crystal clear.

**We need term limits to overturn our corrupt political class and restore moral leadership to Springfield.**

Term limits: It's an idea so simple and so popular that it makes you wonder: Why haven't we done it yet?
[**DO YOU AGREE? JOIN TEAM SULLY**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsiq5heudtf71r93053svrivf97q1ponubhl9010_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi61ob2c1h2bs)
Corruption in our State government is absolutely out of control. And we've got the numbers to back it up:
* Only **25%** of Illinoisans have confidence in our State leadership...
* Which means **Illinois ranks dead last** among all 50 states for trust in our government...
* And it's no wonder, because **4 of our last 11 governors are in prison** for federal crimes!

I don't think I need to tell you just how bad those numbers are....

And with our current leadership, there's really no hope for improvement.

Our current governor, JB Pritzker, hasn't gone after corruption or the special interest machine that is structurally responsible for our problems...

Why would he? He's a part of the problem himself! He's under federal investigation.

It's time to face facts. **If we want a leader who is going to clean up corruption in Illinois, there's only one way to get one: elect a political outsider who’s not afraid to fight for what’s right.**

My name is Jesse “Sully” Sullivan. And I am running to fix the broken politics of Illinois, and to take back our state from corrupt politicians who have forgotten who they work for!

Let me tell you why I’m different.
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z674nbufcsuslpquev53hock8c65h4cmb1v30voo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi61ob2c1h2bs)
[**WATCH NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zose1qjmn3d6a5o2t1nva8md7s1fpuernof8ho68_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi61ob2c1h2bs)
I’ve certainly been blessed beyond what I deserve. To love my neighbor in need through service is my vocational calling. This has taken many forms through my career.

After the 2010 earthquake in Haiti, I served as Special Assistant to the Haitian ambassador, advising on US humanitarian assistance and aid to the country. My experiences there shaped my view that job creation, not free assistance – at home or abroad – are the keys to sustained economic growth.
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcsunmop4m5u3gg9bofd8v9ek7tj4vha9jamuon0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi61ob2c1h2bs)
I served in Afghanistan as an Army civilian, advising counterinsurgency operations in the deadliest district of Afghanistan.

I know firsthand why a strong national defense is essential to our ability to thrive- and why strong economic growth is the key to human flourishing at home and abroad. I carry the same sidearm here at home that I carried abroad, and understand that the Second Amendment is an important piece of our national identity.

My experiences abroad led me to found Alter Global, a venture capital firm that finds and scales the best companies in emerging economies around the world, to reduce extreme poverty and spread the benefits of the new, innovation economy to the developing world.

I share these experiences because they reflect the kind of bridge builder I hope to be, as a candidate, and as your Governor.

I’m proud to be from Illinois, but political mismanagement is ruining our state. I want to reclaim Illinois and make it THE STRONGEST STATE IN THE NATION.
[** MAKE ILLINOIS STRONG - JOIN TEAM SULLY NOW **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za5876aptduamk53m31u63pmalv1mguu3ailqd48_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi61ob2c1h2bs)
Let me be clear: the political establishment in Illinois does NOT want me in this race.

To be honest, they are right to feel threatened - because I am running specifically to end their decades-long mismanagement of our state.

At this point, my friend, you’re probably tired of hearing candidates say they are “not a politician.”

But let me tell you... not only am I not a politician, I would go so far as to say that I am an **anti-politician**.

When I was thinking and praying on whether I should run for governor, I wrote down in my journal exactly what I couldn’t stand about career politicians:

_“Politicians are boring, ego-driven, manipulative, self-promotional,_**_wind-vane watching wind-bags_** _, not getting anything done, sleazy, putting on a facade, not authentic, scandalous, unethical, always following polls not leading,_**_spineless_** _, ideologue, need love and attention, and_** _never truly self-sacrificing._**_”_

That’s everything I swear that I will never, NEVER be. In fact, that’s everything that I vow to stand against.

We don’t need more politicians in office. We need the opposite of that.

**Do you feel the same way, friend?** And are you ready to try something new for our state?

Then I’d like to ask you to join me today.
[** JOIN THE TEAM - DONATE NOW**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z410f0r7ck1fv41lialvi3p7261rkh6imejo5ug8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi61ob2c1h2bs)
Thank you,
Jesse “Sully” Sullivan
Republican Candidate for Governor of Illinois

_P.S. If you donate today, you’ll receive access to an exclusive Team Sully sticker as a small token of my appreciation. Only a true grassroots movement has the power to take on the corruption of our state’s politics.**[Please, stand with me today.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztud0f9ek9gak0rqkfd4392lrm9oln877lmrlpq8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6chi61ob2c1h2bs)**_
---

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Will you be one of my first recruits?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0211933112ff423a9874f191fc0d51cb&_e=gQ_RAWlgPnPMygraPAcCDjZsXzs7DFBP0qI0HMfpWDlFRdMrAiIM055YaHS6VdHch7NQO4O-DPrBjGydrIPwL67AXNlHnydfynOxp1Y4AK85LaRccAO91yHqrtp0zD3Ui5Sh5SNqM52QZjDYM8rku2tSnLLNlLg6eSykj4GabTThlTIO2YjRb_UuGKKjyq3CS53kN7BLbI_t7WCg75hxUglxOnV08vr3qzdn_PF54cm-zm_krxHi3_Yeg-ED4N3rpzVr3yoZunu8wedvAJHnfvH9eU-75HyBk29u6csQjy10FJaNO2G6SZCRWsGcFJU-y3bfBbHXCf9QOsmHR_U7qnPL1J57NaKte2VBPuJk7phyIDqK6ul3JXCCfxYO0EL-f0E1c9Cly2_KfVoPlXiZGAG_wDy-QPetZM_EIdGwd2XfRnsdp8uOisg1H7a6fBjImAlub3Ab1yYIO4aCY6_xdeooJhwHe-wI9K624f_j91I%3D)

---
Peter,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0211933112ff423a9874f191fc0d51cb&_e=gQ_RAWlgPnPMygraPAcCDjZsXzs7DFBP0qI0HMfpWDlFRdMrAiIM055YaHS6VdHch7NQO4O-DPrBjGydrIPwL67AXNlHnydfynOxp1Y4AK85LaRccAO91yHqrtp0zD3Ui5Sh5SNqM52QZjDYM8rku2tSnLLNlLg6eSykj4GabTThlTIO2YjRb_UuGKKjyq3CS53kN7BLbI_t7WCg75hxUglxOnV08vr3qzdn_PF54cm-zm_krxHi3_Yeg-ED4N3rpzVr3yoZunu8wedvAJHnfvpQ_LNP1NvXDMEPqmRfXCaEysfJgJjhK3XbQXb09-0BsgDCifI83OgeFj23tzpVqWW0JxjUaH3287jtwxGrajTaj7Qw2hzyQRKCSAsiwUUBTY599tx6sMHS4butI3yPnga6KLFDNIfTNQolabUi9lqVaC0MQtBpXxU5BgNTPyTPTP1Pl-ExiTgnH71OcKMMynhzIQTlzZSI18vW2T8fz1Q%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0211933112ff423a9874f191fc0d51cb&_e=gQ_RAWlgPnPMygraPAcCDjZsXzs7DFBP0qI0HMfpWDlFRdMrAiIM055YaHS6VdHch7NQO4O-DPrBjGydrIPwL67AXNlHnydfynOxp1Y4AK85LaRccAO91yHqrtp0zD3Ui5Sh5SNqM52QZjDYM8rku2tSnLLNlLg6eSykj4GabTThlTIO2YjRb_UuGKKjyq3CS53kN7BLbI_t7WCg75hxUglxOnV08vr3qzdn_PF54cm-zm_krxHi3_Yeg-ED4N3rpzVr3yoZunu8wedvAJHnfi4sJFAUaNNvpVAtkwVC4NQyhScZI-K6W9-3NPSMIGuqEcjhajxO5eMQo5hR_Wp2ilodCHJp9k93Vn7RB0peGfuBqDXJ9jSHoAghXIbfxpkeqtrfaeOAmhSc_Gk0XQHoV51wrcL81GQHMMnlW28icj0AibHCYI1g7-DX8PAxckHNvnOPTGS1VBAYxXrzWdErOov7nneFLNaF5zW8EQWkD8M%3D)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Peter. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0211933112ff423a9874f191fc0d51cb&_e=gQ_RAWlgPnPMygraPAcCDjZsXzs7DFBP0qI0HMfpWDlFRdMrAiIM055YaHS6VdHch7NQO4O-DPrBjGydrIPwL67AXNlHnydfynOxp1Y4AK85LaRccAO91yHqrtp0zD3Ui5Sh5SNqM52QZjDYM8rku2tSnLLNlLg6eSykj4GabTThlTIO2YjRb_UuGKKjyq3CS53kN7BLbI_t7WCg75hxUglxOnV08vr3qzdn_PF54cm-zm_krxHi3_Yeg-ED4N3rpzVr3yoZunu8wedvAJHnfoJiJA4UytQxbzKRYTi5XiNSYIAW_wzSADmdJRadt5m4VYHemg8h4BkMDevEJCJ6rOQw4hzFAAk4vC8fgL1xbXr8WrjUCR3O6NZZopArNLmXtlwn6rl0JQqcY3wV1URgLs-qd1x8Czx9aWcdcTG3CG0y9mXzfEumt4SqCZANFYoxvEVQYoXOMb6nWiQ8iPdmExDWvzN1lnIDZG3KrcE7WYs%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0211933112ff423a9874f191fc0d51cb&_e=gQ_RAWlgPnPMygraPAcCDjZsXzs7DFBP0qI0HMfpWDlFRdMrAiIM055YaHS6VdHch7NQO4O-DPrBjGydrIPwL67AXNlHnydfynOxp1Y4AK85LaRccAO91yHqrtp0zD3Ui5Sh5SNqM52QZjDYM8rku2tSnLLNlLg6eSykj4GabTThlTIO2YjRb_UuGKKjyq3CS53kN7BLbI_t7WCg75hxUglxOnV08vr3qzdn_PF54cm-zm_krxHi3_Yeg-ED4N3rpzVr3yoZunu8wedvAJHnfn9fwujGXTkhveMKxI0FT45Etauer0fJ1L5O8gILd0_242zRjM--8CJBSka-U1Kbb9VY0vrwNheU8RbgFnmxbgvwk1QPm7kHDsi32inKBwmD21N6WTuwj1f5kMGDh6BcbLpag5auXfO0t_KC-zzMbt_h2_sG3sHp3nGEyYVnfhPTb9ajZmYvlvH3FYNTnzUqK7z0B-F2S2vtPBChuhTLMdc%3D)

clean_body: If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! | Peter, I’ve been on a lot of teams. From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, I know what makes a good teammate. We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win. Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia. I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington. He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government. This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. Georgians deserve better.America deserves better. As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Peter. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team. I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

subject: A fake 'insurrection'
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
I knew it from the start. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drpaulgosar/fake-insurrection-2472878?e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | [ ](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=713d7f5413&e=645b3b1338)
---
| | | Dear Peter,

Remember all the Democrat clamoring about the January 6 "insurrection"?

Well, those Democrats are pretty quiet today.

_That's because we now _know_ that the FBI planted at least one informant, and likely many more, in the crowd that day_.

Their informant even entered the Capitol Building, which Democrats say was an act of "terrorism."

In other words, the narrative that American Patriots tried to "overthrow the government" that day was a complete lie -- a setup by federal law enforcement to make freedom-loving Americans look like bad guys.

I knew it from the beginning.

That's why I've supported all of the January 6 defendants, and especially the ones being held without bail in brutal conditions in a D.C. jail.

We've known it since they illegally spied on President Trump's campaign, Fellow Patriot -- the FBI has gone totally rogue.

[**Help me hold that agency accountable by chipping into my reelection campaign today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=979f296d0b&e=645b3b1338).

I am going to get to the bottom of the FBI's role in the January 6 protests.

_But taking on the Deep State makes me a massive target for the Swamp Creatures and Establishment hacks in Washington_.

[**That's why I'm in urgent need of your support today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=16b3ab7bd5&e=645b3b1338).

[**By contributing generously to my reelection campaign, you're helping me seek truth and justice, for those American patriots who protested -- mostly peacefully -- on January 6**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=25c0442c6f&e=645b3b1338).

It's difficult to overstate the magnitude of this news about the FBI informant in the crowd.

The federal government said that it's intelligence agencies did not warn them of the potential for violence that day.

It turns out, at least one FBI informant participated in the rioting!

The federal government and Deep State are once again lying to the American people to malign Trump-supporting conservatives.

I'm going to get to the truth.

[**That's why I need your support today**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=22df313d9e&e=645b3b1338).

[**A contribution of $10, $25, $50, $100, $250, or more to my reelection campaign will help me retain my seat in Congress so I can hold the Deep State and the FBI accountable for their misdeeds**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=d6c90ef580&e=645b3b1338).

Thank you in advance for helping me in my mission to seek justice.
---
| For America,
[](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=993f6d8ef5&e=645b3b1338) Rep. Paul Gosar, DDS Arizona’s 4th District **P.S.** The FBI was just caught red-handed planting an informant who participated in the January 6 "riots."

I'm going to get to the bottom of just how involved the FBI was in the events of that day, but I need your help.

[**_Chip into my reelection campaign today and help me hold the Deep State accountable_**](https://drpaulgosar.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7c5af6d9acae2e4f6ee86cbd&id=bae1b230da&e=645b3b1338).

name: Nikki Fried
subject: I know times are tough, so I want to express my gratitude
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Friends,

I know times are tough right now. Ron DeSantis has left Florida in crisis, from COVID-19 to new attacks on abortion rights.

It would be easy to lose hope right now, but you’ve continued to support our movement. Because of you, I’m more hopeful than ever that we can break Florida’s rigged system and defeat DeSantis.
Thanks to you, we’re in a stronger position to defeat Ron DeSantis next year.

Our movement has always been about more than defeating Ron DeSantis. It’s about breaking the rigged system that has enabled politicians like him to cause crisis after crisis.

With supporters like you, I know we can get it done. Thanks for being on our team and for all your incredible support.

With Gratitude,
Nikki

Friend,

I just wanted to send a quick note and say: **Thank you.**

For the past couple weeks, we asked you to step up in a big way and help us hit an ambitious quarterly fundraising goal, and I'm happy to announce that we didn't just hit our goal -- you blew the deadline out of the water.

I can't begin to tell you how grateful I am, friend.

**Because of you, our team is able to continue laying the groundwork for a winning campaign -- one that is laser-focused on building on our Democratic majority, protecting our democracy, empowering workers, and so much more.**

So, thank you for your support.

\-- Conor Lamb

body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6fb3df9466f547dd8c1d6f4ee454f9aa&_e=jRD_2SxK0FGE_5l72z9qUtP5JvEO0bGU2-h-Nwn5JMlfiAOc9AXJOcKjRetmozJvo5aj3e0O8D53o7_J7bL5yK3ESSBG7mOa9i33WsxbfvokMT51wDkhwrVAwPph3gQbpSXJGb5yCJmWpeYMTi_wu2OB5MD15fonuLn-FH1-bFILeMMDGgzkTbbvtfmhOSSpMX8ISR0HpUFIOkwWGLum_89e2lDg4C1lpnIVIJNjLFx0CW2yJKwaGNJC5JiGH90jCW5PkXOpTMuvnpU2poluFDWVXS0nLO6wbO2RQmudCIhNlTu6MaxqhPNz_aayUFy3JsnbTuTUvkmq69xVrucbDtsydOfrctgCa-FV7BJkNA0tRWBJ_StPIvo29wT9WAh7BDG0UgJhNZxoF1cJSNgVVcukDqhCwEleefYAPDSfnA4RrVH5ejQMiDLvArYuQJfpIco4dCcSmG7iOlwE5fo-OA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6fb3df9466f547dd8c1d6f4ee454f9aa&_e=jRD_2SxK0FGE_5l72z9qUtP5JvEO0bGU2-h-Nwn5JMlfiAOc9AXJOcKjRetmozJvo5aj3e0O8D53o7_J7bL5yK3ESSBG7mOa9i33WsxbfvokMT51wDkhwrVAwPph3gQbpSXJGb5yCJmWpeYMTi_wu2OB5MD15fonuLn-FH1-bFILeMMDGgzkTbbvtfmhOSSpMX8ISR0HpUFIOkwWGLum_89e2lDg4C1lpnIVIJNjLFx0CW2yJKwaGNJC5JiGH90j5Z-Y-1L34bdvWcdMkjq1feA5RBcKZuGvkxcykQkvkIuEqsZWHThIFaRjUiKlPNz3gRGuMojPbnBJ1Z2Wfy_gihEC6Y3NuOCXXruOGJZdUCwr_VD-W1ms-3ZkPXHEReMtBWx4xOYZ8leEA4Bgqi9YwEdL4huTQ2zv93bH8qrHJXwqBBKXSCQRgjTjCM9BkPo-r7ZIl4i350UUlC3URj6kmQ%3D%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6fb3df9466f547dd8c1d6f4ee454f9aa&_e=jRD_2SxK0FGE_5l72z9qUtP5JvEO0bGU2-h-Nwn5JMlfiAOc9AXJOcKjRetmozJvo5aj3e0O8D53o7_J7bL5yK3ESSBG7mOa9i33WsxbfvokMT51wDkhwrVAwPph3gQbpSXJGb5yCJmWpeYMTi_wu2OB5MD15fonuLn-FH1-bFILeMMDGgzkTbbvtfmhOSSpMX8ISR0HpUFIOkwWGLum_89e2lDg4C1lpnIVIJNjLFx0CW2yJKwaGNJC5JiGH90jZVvfBPsQlw_rx-HXABwuQyrK_oqfuP0nlkV-QOL_qONXp8qeoXlHfvIDCe0vdPr0BTZtXiwQ-YZM9xitA3x0lwDHlgsOsnu0v0ivWzAMnrI5aYxk8VboPGpfg3BKPCsdw6KGGOvja8tbfcS91XWItV56Ivlas5s69W2cUAkT1hL4WvTTHpggLp1XYk96-VGktM6o7qGlpBiRAIvmCYr0GA%3D%3D)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6fb3df9466f547dd8c1d6f4ee454f9aa&_e=jRD_2SxK0FGE_5l72z9qUtP5JvEO0bGU2-h-Nwn5JMlfiAOc9AXJOcKjRetmozJvo5aj3e0O8D53o7_J7bL5yK3ESSBG7mOa9i33WsxbfvokMT51wDkhwrVAwPph3gQbpSXJGb5yCJmWpeYMTi_wu2OB5MD15fonuLn-FH1-bFILeMMDGgzkTbbvtfmhOSSpMX8ISR0HpUFIOkwWGLum_89e2lDg4C1lpnIVIJNjLFx0CW2yJKwaGNJC5JiGH90jMkywmjab62jdTv9gfY5oFhqm2YZmairQjagZ3p_zzpAjuz4_u3lwvRGa_pqqPMFI3b6lmxFzIM8vnF5MjQow9Zdi1fKj9laUGF4PCHPjap7Kw3JTgZEFh9-_XTcqr_E9vVDSbYQwoX24tbxQPZThwJZt8SvyERjhHVyDX21ZGljgoroUST4N-nGyT0LD-ncYimPEkeK7K1xa8b9XAfpOng%3D%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Fellow Conservative, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6fb3df9466f547dd8c1d6f4ee454f9aa&_e=jRD_2SxK0FGE_5l72z9qUtP5JvEO0bGU2-h-Nwn5JMlfiAOc9AXJOcKjRetmozJvo5aj3e0O8D53o7_J7bL5yK3ESSBG7mOa9i33WsxbfvokMT51wDkhwrVAwPph3gQbpSXJGb5yCJmWpeYMTi_wu2OB5MD15fonuLn-FH1-bFILeMMDGgzkTbbvtfmhOSSpMX8ISR0HpUFIOkwWGLum_89e2lDg4C1lpnIVIJNjLFx0CW2yJKwaGNJC5JiGH90jUJMfmzvaJiiLecce8fKboo4QB3BvmN2jNAcz0EVme1RsAYg0kAWji-AW29bEBn4fwv_ZfHP1t3DOdIc5vlDG7UJWfUcaYh7hn0fcIEyMGjpfdSiQvniOf9JA87_pT3J4B4Ui6LtcgRood5Addxrn-8BBS4eOl38aZqtAKe_SxkDcUp6nttN5UaFrLWfZfzOYzHyOOIR6OvaC4xFiW_y--w%3D%3D)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8858%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=h6ud3WW7Niewq%2bq0uqLNww&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15555%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8%2bKvaGWf9D1CaA15o3fsUA&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15556%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NQSgogaGRykpPnZ3SrOcTg&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15555%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8%2bKvaGWf9D1CaA15o3fsUA&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15557%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FUFerSzLJ0U8HFP3fk1X3g&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15558%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xJfPMj%2bo02xAlkEYyFNjpA&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15559%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tLkgUXa4G0kRI7%2fq3UT1BA&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58452132:6cQ6NV2Nw:m:1:3253819041:27C5DED0B9962B9463DFC4B6E814279D:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58452132:6cQ6NV2Nw:m:1:3253819041:27C5DED0B9962B9463DFC4B6E814279D:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58452132:6cQ6NV2Nw:m:1:3253819041:27C5DED0B9962B9463DFC4B6E814279D:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58452132:6cQ6NV2Nw:m:1:3253819041:27C5DED0B9962B9463DFC4B6E814279D:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58452132:6cQ6NV2Nw:m:1:3253819041:27C5DED0B9962B9463DFC4B6E814279D:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58452132:6cQ6NV2Nw:m:1:3253819041:27C5DED0B9962B9463DFC4B6E814279D:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58452133:6cQ6NV2Nw:m:1:3253819041:27C5DED0B9962B9463DFC4B6E814279D:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58452134:6cQ6NV2Nw:m:1:3253819041:27C5DED0B9962B9463DFC4B6E814279D:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58452135:6cQ6NV2Nw:m:1:3253819041:27C5DED0B9962B9463DFC4B6E814279D:r)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58452136:6cQ6NV2Nw:m:1:3253819041:27C5DED0B9962B9463DFC4B6E814279D:r)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58452137:6cQ6NV2Nw:m:1:3253819041:27C5DED0B9962B9463DFC4B6E814279D:r) **

# **Friend — You power our fight to deliver results for Kansans and Americans. With your help, we closed out the fundraising quarter with the momentum needed to keep it up! **

---
Right now, there’s as clear a choice facing Americans as I’ve seen in my lifetime.

**Option 1: Give the Democrats two more years of total control in Washington and free rein to ram through their socialist agenda and forever change our country.**

**Option 2: Say we’ve had ENOUGH, defend President Trump’s legacy, and win back the U.S. House and Senate.**

I know where I stand, and our team’s work is just getting started. And I’m glad to have you standing with us.

We’ll be reaching out with more opportunities to help soon, but today I simply wanted to say thank you.

We couldn’t do this without you, and with your help we’re going to take our country back!
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3aedbfcf8949bdfc/129c9d252c6ea761c3d6b838967d376c)
Senator Roger Marshall

P.S. – if you missed this fundraising deadline, it’s not too late to have an impact. [**Click here to chip in $22 to help us kickstart the final fundraising quarter of 2021!**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3aedbfcf8949bdfc/754d188a5aa45be1c3d6b838967d376c)
|

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/3aedbfcf8949bdfc/5f1b758fe81ef2b7c3d6b838967d376c)

Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith.

**He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help.**

We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference.

However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=3aedbfcf8949bdfc&d=d2d4b3def475226ac3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=3aedbfcf8949bdfc).

name: Wesley Britt
subject: Want to get off of the sidelines?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=83347b59c4c74b33bca74d6d49d8700a&_e=70IP4dHqZm5-tehl2ZkX5Nd-DtarbwlGd-J2u0IO5Ez9Rjhy3qmK7dQFu4EOV7-OWVK9gHU7Bws6ity-k7IRoN6LoNBz2LJ9N4OHXDsx6fnkqS47WBJSeJP1cwHugipUbMMBtVaTKIVsq-gbS9wozixIWIm1LizphqinF6ke7m8q5rLX39gJXhJqVxIK0qikv3IYa9P9zqncF4TCPObRbYaU4nQFumtj-PhZCZSdneNo1ZGFGZS_E-UA7k7ztyjhs1BQxb8vypt1OAsM8lAdg7Nd_LODh0g_Px2oCres0noOBSr5wnIoECGB8ss-KYOstTti2lyccr3PV2g3oH-NT4LwGkmSqN2TuEscfAn36zV07A6_59Xop3FgxjIbHTfACCaWq-8JLWK3Z7o9hWx2L-u2mhZfhxHA2FIimOPWcxqKqM_ufyMnHEyiodvqW3bLHwLDCl-jH_jT_BLHUVzxyg%3D%3D) Peter, Football season is HERE! That means it’s time to put on your favorite jersey and root for YOUR Alabama team. As a former team captain for the Crimson Tide, Katie and I are excited to see what happens this season. We wanted to share this excitement with you, Peter! So I’m partnering with my friend and former Auburn Defensive End, Bret Eddins, to announce our WEEKLY **Score Pick’Em Contest!** Here’s how to play: **With a minimum donation of $25 you can send in your prediction of the final scores for both the Alabama and Auburn games each week. We will subtract the prediction from each game with the actual final score and then add the scores together from both games. The person with the lowest total score WINS!**

The crisis at the southern border continues to escalate as Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas warns DHS officials that 400,000 illegals are traveling to the US. This is more than double the average number of illegal entries in to our country under Joe Biden (which is already a record).

This comes on the heels of Biden forcing a vaccine mandate on Border Patrol agents working to protect the homeland. And, to make matters worse, **Congress voted against mandatory COVID testing for illegal aliens.**

name: Susie Lee
subject: Remembering 1 October
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress
body:
Today marks four years since senseless tragedy struck our state.

I’m remembering the 58 individuals who died that night and left behind devastated families and communities across the country. I hope you’ll join me in remembering the lives we lost.

Las Vegas will never be a place where extreme hate and violence wins. This is exactly why we came together as a community to mourn and take positive action in the name of the people we lost and their families.

Let’s also remember our first responders who handled that night professionally and saved so many lives because of their commitment to our safety and health. It’s because of their selflessness that our communities are strong.

The pain from 1 October still impacts the lives of so many today. It’s critical that we remain steadfast in our commitment to eradicate gun violence from our communities. We can do this for the 58 people we lost, their families, and the countless other victims across our country.

Take today to reach out to those around you who may be struggling. Let them know that we’re here for them and the path forward will bring healing.

Forever Vegas Strong.

- Susie Lee

We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to remove yourself from our list, click

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36867462/309380110/-1614289773?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDAzOTEzOC1mZDIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETHbKYv50M6u85bIblmF6cO6R40jrRd0YgI-FV4Dw_0=&emci=27af571c-f422-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=0d039138-fd22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=11385749)

Peter,

Because of you, we crushed our end-of-quarter goal. When Catherine, my finance director, called me to give me our final total I was incredibly proud of what we accomplished together.

It's because of amazing grassroots supporters like you that we've been able to take this campaign to new heights, and I'm so thankful that you're part of the team that will put our district back in the hands of the people, where it belongs.

**I know we are going to do this. I know we can win. What we're building here is special.**

Also while I'm here, I want to make sure you're invited to the thousands of Women's Marches happening across the country -- with a few happening right here in this district.

Here is a link where you can get more information: **[https://map.womensmarch.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36867463/309380111/280245776?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDAzOTEzOC1mZDIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETHbKYv50M6u85bIblmF6cO6R40jrRd0YgI-FV4Dw_0=&emci=27af571c-f422-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=0d039138-fd22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=11385749)**

**I'll be at a local march talking about what reproductive freedom means to me. I would love to see you there. Here are the details:** **[March for Reproductive Rights](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/36867464/309380112/-282743550?akid=&source=map&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDAzOTEzOC1mZDIyLWVjMTEtOTgxZi01MDFhYzUxMGE0MDUiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ETHbKYv50M6u85bIblmF6cO6R40jrRd0YgI-FV4Dw_0=&emci=27af571c-f422-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&emdi=0d039138-fd22-ec11-981f-501ac510a405&ceid=11385749)**

name: Babylon Bee
subject: Facebook is targeting us
body:
If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee. Maybe you’ve even had a laugh at one or two of them. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c464%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2cHqIG1aTVPSxPFSS26AKg&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66855%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sR5%2fXkX75YDzawoJ2qG8lA&sysid=1) | |
---
Friend,

If you’ve spent any time on Facebook, you’ve probably seen the occasional post from the Babylon Bee. Maybe you’ve even had a laugh at one or two of them.

But if you’re familiar with our work, you may have noticed that our posts aren't showing up in your Facebook newsfeed anymore.

**That's because Facebook is suppressing our content.**

Take a look at this chart showing engagement with our posts over the past year:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66856%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xuCe2mM4c4Oqg%2bjYPgKixA&sysid=1)
Despite our growing audience--we have many more followers now than we did a year ago--we're seeing a drastic, steady decline in reach and engagement. It used to be that 80% of our site's traffic came from Facebook. Now, it's down to just 30%. Babylon Bee articles posted to Facebook used to go viral, generating hundreds of thousands of shares. But that just doesn't happen anymore. Facebook doesn't allow it.

In some cases, our posts aren't merely limited in reach -- they're completely suppressed. Here's an example of a recent post that Facebook prevented from being seen by anyone:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66856%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xuCe2mM4c4Oqg%2bjYPgKixA&sysid=1)
We'd have reached more people if we'd printed the article and posted it on a single telephone pole in a small town.

Facebook has assigned a representative to our account. He's supposed to communicate with us and help us resolve problems. But when we ask him directly if Facebook is limiting our page's reach, or suppressing shares of our articles, he refuses to answer me. He literally doesn't respond. He'll respond to other questions, but not that one.

The silence speaks volumes.

So what can be done about this? For now, there's not much that can be done. Facebook is a private company. While they shouldn't be allowed to engage in politically motivated viewpoint discrimination and still enjoy the benefits of Section 230 immunity, there's nothing under the law that currently prevents them from doing just that. This needs to change.

But in the meantime, all we can do is ask for direct support from free-thinking friends like you.

[**As someone who values free speech, I’m asking you to consider becoming a subscriber to the Babylon Bee today. By becoming a subscriber, you reduce our dependence on Big Tech and ensure we'll continue to have a presence and a platform, whether Facebook likes it or not.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66857%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=duUUZaB8dSXsJRX7Lfw1wg&sysid=1)
[**Subscribe**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66858%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=epLX2FBgLn4ua1i9KMbKeA&sysid=1)
Plus, if you become a premium subscriber, you’ll get a beautiful coffee table book chock-full of our greatest articles, preserved for posterity. Let’s see Facebook try to censor that!

Thank you for standing with us against the tyranny of Big Tech. We don't need Facebook if we've got you in our corner.

Seth Dillon
CEO
|
---

_Copyright(C) 2020 Babylon Bee, All rights reserved._
**Our mailing address is:**
The Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box 546
Jupiter, FL 33468
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c464%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2cHqIG1aTVPSxPFSS26AKg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c464%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2cHqIG1aTVPSxPFSS26AKg&sysid=1)

| Hi Peter,

I wanted to take a moment to say **thank you.** Thanks to generous contributions from grassroots supporters like you, we were able to surpass our quarterly fundraising goal of $25,000.

You know that I’m not like my far-right opponents, Peter. I don’t have millions of dollars of personal wealth to pour into my campaign, and I don’t take money from corporate PACs. I rely on individual grassroots contributions to keep my campaign going and keep me in office fighting for folks of the greater Lehigh Valley and the entire country.

Thanks to you, I’ll be able to keep working for the issues that really matter to families across the greater Lehigh Valley and the United States, like good jobs, affordable health care, and strong infrastructure.

I look forward to continuing to make change together, Peter.
---
Thank you,
