Dear Friends, We have just over a month left of the campaign! It is hard to believe how far we've come since we started this journey together. Thank you to everyone who has already voted. Because of you, turnout is at an all-time high in the [Republican held Congressional Districts of 1,5,6 and 9](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VV_rSS3zBtMNVw2Xlf3CkycHW7Kkhd54y7sN8N50kgNr3lSbtV1-WJV7CgMVWW4CPSfK48fwncW2cV64g2SHhN2W52h0cx5wS-_rN13S_Tc8YKJhW4-rfr42PMVlfW2hdltY7L5mxMN5DDhtrBbWt7VJ10dY7Kr4tqW6MnffL5j-1cFN1m0FvS7TVnFW6bYkbZ7bVjwMN4qbRxcfFVtpW2T3BDg7_2Q73W5RBRxZ6bQbd7VJrsSF44B_djW64Q3Xm8D3Lc_W4n4smX41CjMMW4GCDMn5GJTZxW7FJPmN8XkZG5W8FNWSx59MLM33lW31). If you haven't already voted, we need your help keeping Terry on his heels by hitting the polls as soon as possible. In-person early voting is the safest and easiest way to ensure that we win in November! If you need to register to vote, check your voter registration, or find your polling location, you can follow the link below. Let's go, Virginia!
---
| [ **I'M VOTING FOR GLENN!** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VV_rSS3zBtMNVw2Xlf3CkycHW7Kkhd54y7sN8N50kgNL3lSbNV1-WJV7CgR9-N2CZ40Nr00CkW2v6Hp54pYy8FW1_YrxN77l_6zW95C7w76MfLgxVq759B2CL2NkW6S44bV6nhqKzN2vLrFdp5rk0W76L9rG4cVqCbN6-CKMwylZwXW4QZcxV1srwwFN4pNK8s697VMN2ckC9zg0f8PW4Sv1vc6RnpclW1dBmnm7PMGLNW4QYDQ34CwTwCW90tTGD8pjLxGW6qm3RJ4TKMnkW4rvlwB36h5bZW1Bw8ds4D3-lhW7p2mKn6sKSDcW4l_tSp2GBkXbW1kZF5m58Dzpj38P91)

| | |
---|---|---
Thank you to everyone who tuned in Tuesday night for the second debate. I am grateful that I had another opportunity to lay out my [vision for Virginia](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VV_rSS3zBtMNVw2Xlf3CkycHW7Kkhd54y7sN8N50kgNL3lSbNV1-WJV7CgG7MW2bTcx78X1gNDW12R7LM27ybSPW2gJhKq2NgPNQW3GBYn34ZxSXzN4hS1KYjw8PZW6RtGPd6cnVN-W7CN4jb209FNwW83fWwK2TCKwpW493kFg4L8SmbW1cxvsk1H1nVCW37BC8m6N-Q6XW5vCCF27mkMHhW1tSMKW337Y0zW8jpfLF7Fsm0ZW4vmlYM6mh1k9Ms-hPVCYd_qW9k6Qh474DYrVV3xw2b5QXGjcW3kDffS4r03JfW4s47gp64m88RW2Cdmkt7lsjgfW8-05Sx6wn3rz335p1), where we return excellence to our school systems, reclaim our neighborhoods from soaring crime rates, and bring jobs back to the Commonwealth. While I was successful and remain the undefeated debate champion, Terry McAuliffe had the audacity to say that "parents should [not] be telling schools what to teach." Friends, this is what we get with career politicians who are bought and paid for by unions. On day one, I will stand for parents and students and make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. You can watch Terry tell us how he thinks parents should not have a say in their children's education by clicking the image below.
---
[ ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VV_rSS3zBtMNVw2Xlf3CkycHW7Kkhd54y7sN8N50kgNL3lSbNV1-WJV7CgHCkVC8__s3JcqWhN75zDSSHHf6qVZV6Bx4qlpPnW8sfzXq39wyp9W4ymZ748KPytqW133GhX8xlkX-W38w59k430BbvN2Kt7s9Rd5k0W4pdXNw3gkcFbN23tjDgGYyckW6QxCrx2MDNzcW4R6fv-5C1kbMW6prN4F4qhMLrW9bCXgq5kqcLsVxD-VQ67nBSpW8j9VZR97vD9PW8Bykrp9cFtGHW143v_B31J5vvW9jFhKm6hSkkfW6QK8Cy4HvsCpW6TKLcn9cJKs2W3tvg944fmZr-3mJw1)
---
| | |
---|---|---
I witnessed some amazing energy from the Eastern Shore on Wednesday! Between Chincoteague, Tangier, and Exmore, I had an amazing time meeting with first responders and locals, sharing my plan for Virginia, and learning about life on the island. Virginia needs a new leader who will get things done for you by returning power to the people and not politicians begging for a second chance. As your next Governor, I will work hard for you. You can learn more about my vision for the Commonwealth by following the link below.
---
| [ **DAY ONE GAME PLAN** ](https://d150hB04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Btc/V+113/d150hB04/VV_rSS3zBtMNVw2Xlf3CkycHW7Kkhd54y7sN8N50kgNL3lSbNV1-WJV7CgNqWW4v8BKd8Tdz-KW4_QYZ36TZSFxN4fKP20bVYc9W7N9Np28GhmtlW2YJf4l47X29cW6k63ss6TyNvLW7wddRv8WPj_qW3l5V5t1p1xDJW6y8F893__wQ7W66NhFN65WB-fN1dKYfFptyG5MDQKQdNB94xW5v5cgs5Lq1ZqW176NrG2LYQRTVwp51b3HGTV0N5WqLCV5zKqVW2D6b_S3f9k0mV6qRZ24Wmn9xN7pQkhgT4C62W6QnNwL4DJMpqW1lxVzf7-JGJQW5hJfWz2mtZBB36Gf1)
---
---

| | |
---|---|---
We are sprinting towards the finish line and the end of the campaign is in sight. Terry McAuliffe is flailing and it's easy to see why: we are up in the polls, our energy is high, and I am ready to get to work for you as your next Governor! Giving Terry another chance will mean recycled and failed policies from a 43-year career politician, but I will make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. I encourage everyone who has not already voted to make a plan to bring 10 friends and hit the polls this week! Remember, early voting ends on October 30th and Election Day is November 2nd.
---
Bring friends and vote early!
---
---
Glenn Youngkin
---

name: Erica Smith
subject: Whew!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
Together, we were able to finish the quarter strong.
#
Y'all,
**We. Just. Did. That!! 👏👏👏**
Thanks to this wonderful, beautiful, incredible team, we were able to not only meet our end-of-quarter online fundraising goal, but we were able to SURPASS it.
I still can’t believe it. That’s why I want to extend my deepest gratitude and congratulations to YOU! You are a key part of this movement, whether you donated or not please know — I appreciate you SO MUCH and I can’t wait to continue on this journey with you.
Growing up Black in the rural south, I’ve spent my whole life being counted out and told about all the things that I can’t do. You just helped me prove that our moral movement is real and strong, and that together, we’re capable of accomplishing anything. If they’re still discounting us, it’s their loss.
Now, here’s a rundown of just some of what we were able to achieve together in our third quarter and what’s coming:
* * *
**Where we’ve been:**
* * *
**100 County, 100 Day Tour 🚗**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18669?t=1&akid=516%2E3698%2EkpEGs2)
Last month I visited 100 counties across North Carolina in 100 days. Our team faced car troubles and the last of the summertime heat, but this was a truly joyful experience for me. Getting out there and talking to all kinds of folks and showing them why this moral movement is so important was incredible. Hearing folks’ stories and telling them about mine was only possible thanks to the generosity of folks like YOU! ⭐️
* * *
**Where we’re going:**
* * *
**1 Dollar, 1 Door Initiative 🚪**
You thought we were done getting out into the community?! Not even close! We’re starting $1, one door. For every dollar you donate, we will knock on a door in a county that Trump won in 2020. I’m COMMITTED to changing hearts and minds. And I’m not leaving anyone behind. Flipping North Carolina blue will LITERALLY take opening doors. Stay tuned for more!
* * *
[_**If you’re feeling inspired and ready to join the fight to bring our progressive values to the halls of Congress, please consider pitching in to our campaign for U.S. Senate. Every single donation helps reach voters in every corner of North Carolina.**_](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/18669?t=2&akid=516%2E3698%2EkpEGs2)
With love and gratitude,
Erica ❤️
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

clean_body: Together, we were able to finish the quarter strong. Y'all, We. Just. Did. That!! 👏👏👏 Thanks to this wonderful, beautiful, incredible team, we were able to not only meet our end-of-quarter online fundraising goal, but we were able to SURPASS it. I still can’t believe it. That’s why I want to extend my deepest gratitude and congratulations to YOU! You are a key part of this movement, whether you donated or not please know — I appreciate you SO MUCH and I can’t wait to continue on this journey with you. Growing up Black in the rural south, I’ve spent my whole life being counted out and told about all the things that I can’t do. You just helped me prove that our moral movement is real and strong, and that together, we’re capable of accomplishing anything. If they’re still discounting us, it’s their loss. Now, here’s a rundown of just some of what we were able to achieve together in our third quarter and what’s coming: Where we’ve been: 100 County, 100 Day Tour 🚗 Last month I visited 100 counties across North Carolina in 100 days. We just wrapped up our Freedom Tour across the state and it was unbelievable! Thousands of people came out to show their support and I was so humbled by their words of encouragement.

Our RV was a big help getting us from town to town, but we were on the road for a while and it used a lot of gas...and thanks to Bidenflation, it was not cheap to fill that thing up!

name: Governor Steve Sisolak
subject: Remembering 1 October
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
| | |
---
| | On October 1, 2017, 58 people were killed and hundreds more were injured when a gunman opened fire on a crowded music festival. As a community, we continue to stand together with strength and compassion as we remember the victims of this senseless act of violence. No amount of thanks will ever be enough for the selfless members of law enforcement, first responders, medical professionals, and everyday citizens who rushed to provide help and safety in those terrible moments. We also continue to be grateful for the overwhelming national support for the victims and our mourning community in the wake of this tragedy. Through our grief, we continue to work toward putting an end to gun violence in our state. And we will keep fighting to ensure that this never happens again. **To everyone who continues to feel the impact of this tragic day: We are standing with you. We are fighting for you. We will never forget.** In solidarity, Steve Sisolak

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We held the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Progressives aren’t giving in because we will not leave families behind.
#
Peter,
**Last night, we held the line.** We stopped attempts by corporate America and a few conservative Democrats to pass their small bill _without_ President Biden’s popular Build Back Better Act that makes long-overdue investments in working people, families, and our communities. Corporations are FURIOUS.
**But Progressives aren’t giving in.** We kept our leverage to ensure Democrats in Congress expand Medicare, secure universal child care, pre-K, and community college, fight climate change, invest in affordable housing, and so much more.
**The fight continues. We know that corporate America, Big Pharma, and the fossil fuel industry will only redouble their efforts to stop climate action and economic relief to the people. They will funnel even more money into their negative ad campaigns.**
[**If you’re still with me in this fight for big, bold progressive change that helps working people, chip in $3 right now to fuel my push for President Biden’s Build Back Better Act.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7249?refcode=em20211001-684&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=684%2E420207%2EivhPAn)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7249?refcode=em20211001-684&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=684%2E420207%2EivhPAn)**
Look, only about 5% of Congressional Democrats are opposing the $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill. The influence of corporate PACs and Wall Street are very clearly propping up opposition to the Democratic agenda that people across America demanded at the ballot box. **But I’m fighting back and I need you to join me.**
Our progressive caucus is stronger and more resolute than ever. We won’t give in to corporations profiting from polluting our planet, forcing folks to ration their prescription drugs, and evicting people from their homes.
[**We can only keep our progressive fight strong by working together. Can you contribute $3 today to keep our fight strong? We will deliver for the people, no matter what corporate America and Big Pharma does.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/7249?refcode=em20211001-684&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=684%2E420207%2EivhPAn)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211001-684-footer&t=23&refcode2=684_420207_ivhPAn&akid=684%2E420207%2EivhPAn)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=684%2E420207%2EivhPAn)

name: John Fetterman
subject: Pennsylvanians know how to show up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
-
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211001-2856-header&t=1&akid=2856%2E434096%2Ew4CZ2R)
One thing is clear after last night, Peter — Pennsylvania voters know how to show up.
**With the support of thousands of donors across the country, we were able to hit our Q3 fundraising goal in the final few hours ahead of last night’s deadline.**
This is a BIG deal — not just to our team, but to the opponents and pundits who would have liked to see our campaign fail. By hitting last night’s goal, Peter, we’ve proven that we’re one step closer to being the 51st Democratic vote in the U.S. Senate. There's never been a more crucial time to elect the leaders who we know will never let working people down — *especially* as we see what's happening in Washington right now.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/32330?refcode=em20211001-2856&t=2&akid=2856%2E434096%2Ew4CZ2R)
If you were able to donate to claim your $10 union-made yard sign for our campaign — can’t wait to see a photo! If you missed the cutoff,**[I'd like to take this opportunity to personally extend the deadline for you for just one more day. Gisele and I have already hand-delivered a few signs, and I'd love to get you yours before we ship out the rest.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20211001-2856&t=3&akid=2856%2E434096%2Ew4CZ2R)** Just don't go telling my campaign manager. 🤫
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/30248?refcode=em20211001-2856&t=4&akid=2856%2E434096%2Ew4CZ2R)
_Ain't she pretty?_
The road ahead is bound to have challenges, but with last night’s success I know that we can overcome any obstacle this race throws our way.**I am humbled and thankful by the outpouring of support from this amazing team.**
I’m glad that we’re in this together. Thank you, and see you out there. 🙏
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211001-2856-footer&t=5&refcode2=2856_434096_w4CZ2R&akid=2856%2E434096%2Ew4CZ2R)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2856%2E434096%2Ew4CZ2R)

name: Team Hawley
subject: FWD: Last night on Hannity: General Milley And Secretary Austin Should Resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
[](fr_hold_them_accountable_fwd) | |
---
Peter,
Josh is not popular in Washington right now. Why? Because he has called out incompetent leadership at every level, from General Milley and the Secretary of Defense, who botched the Afghanistan withdrawal, to the Secretary of the Department of Homeland Security, to President Biden himself. Josh has demanded accountability for the actions that have set our nation back.

He has called for General Milley, Secretary Austin and President Biden to resign, because those three are directly responsibly for America's swift and sudden decline on the world stage. Since Biden became president, our enemies no longer fear us, and our allies no longer trust us.

Josh appeared on Fox News to talk with Sean Hannity about the need for accountability at the top, and what he is doing to fight back against the Biden Administration's dangerous agenda.

Watch the clip [**HERE**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=12f29b41b60045f0bcb8d1262f374829&_e=OjjuFCpBH8u_X-ZIfXYZXQuFiZWiZ2vOIGcQHSOvSSlSjudVDvtg6P7Ij4UI-7YIUuoY2PYf6_QqIv-17Sv0SqsG6hLyzXqa3lDo6xTFVlNTfEysgUZigyOFq6wDnZmCwWP0CT9Di26iFlQY9R7DebNY2M-32lfEqtgCJBcwzExICqfbqvXvT9IRyoLvAvHG76m0zsqP4kfHjcZ0gVJUgWNFmaNZqrAUOCtvKm3Ekq-1QKsdsQkBM5wJgyGwkKZTgQbnlRPOaU1_mWru2m5rPQT2DOhqpg2aafI2gW7zht0VKJmyBUe2ET_8YlL5tK9JqUXzz3XtHQmsECcyo1J1vVe8NQy_0dIOsjw2gIT_v02yaZ84cFvsBfTRiqss0UqXRkHRZkV3yDx2nORDMugfgD-8o5vIduwa3LGIjyqQ3Oo%3D) or in the email below.
God Bless,

Team Hawley

\-------Forwarded message-------
From: Josh Hawley

name: =?utf-8?Q?Justice=20Democrats?=
subject: Joe Manchin’s biggest nightmare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
#
Peter,
Yesterday, Joe Manchin and other obstructionist Democrats fought until late in the night to obstruct progressives, and our biggest shot to expand Medicare, address climate change, increase corporate tax rates, and provide universal pre-K and community college.
**Our progressive coalition in Congress didn’t let them win. Justice Democrats held the line and successfully delayed a vote on the bipartisan infrastructure bill. And they won’t let up until Congress passes a $3.5 trillion spending bill to back it up.**
When speaking to reporters outside the Capitol yesterday, Manchin referred to the actions of Justice Democrats in Congress, saying “if liberals want to pass a bigger bill, they should elect more liberals.”**What he really meant was that if progressives wanted to pass a bigger bill, they should elect more Justice Democrats. And we couldn’t agree more.**
[](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=b1e8dd655f&e=5a4b10d0ec)
[Justice Democrats have been on the frontlines of the fight to hold the line and pass the $3.5 trillion spending bill. But this bill is just the beginning. If we want to pass bigger and bolder legislation, we’re going to have to elect more Justice Democrats.](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=55526f1d9b&e=5a4b10d0ec)
**[Contribute](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=6c5499bf36&e=5a4b10d0ec)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats
[Donate »](https://justicedems.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e4c9a958a83443ccd74ba8474&id=00b0747424&e=5a4b10d0ec)

Mail us: 10629 Hardin Valley Rd #226, Knoxville, TN 37932.

subject: Pelosi’s socialist goodie bag will cost you

body:
Fellow Conservative, Have you seen this “infrastructure” bill? We might as well call it what it is... A socialist goodie bag. _**_Here are the FACTS about this infrastructure bill:_** _
* Only 9% of it is actually for infrastructure
* House Democrats added to it and now the spending has increased to $3.5 Trillion
* It only helps blue Democrat cities instead of rural America
* It will only make our already record inflation much worse

**This bill is the Green New Deal Lite, Fellow Conservative. **
**But, do you know what the worst part is? They refused to pass****President Trump’s ****infrastructure bill in 2017 that cost**** _HALF_********as much as this one**. name: Kevin Kiley
subject: Newsom New Vaccine Mandate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [Newsom's Vaccine Hypocrisy](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopnEtTwWifGxI_7NviMNEyQF-vZuwz8oap3I9VGYwIDfA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_111&n=1) Today Gavin Newsom violated the rights of millions of California families with a statewide vaccine mandate for students. [Here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziopWxql2oGqwxLK55YBF4nbD3IwaXqbQh6B8i0nPkWQ-dKLE9xWvp8wwQhMVj-h4Yng&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_111&n=2) is my full statement as Vice Chair of the Assembly Education Committee. Just days ago, Newsom actively _opposed_ a mandate for prison guards. The reason: their union gave him $1.75 million in the Recall. Special Interests can buy their way out of vaccine mandates just like lockdowns. For Newsom, your rights as a parent mean nothing. The well-being of your child means nothing. Public health and “science” mean nothing. All that matters is money and headlines. California kids didn’t donate millions to his campaign, so they’ve been attacked relentlessly. Now they're being expelled if they don’t get the shot. I am renewing my calls to pass ACR 46, my Resolution to end the State of Emergency and rein in a Governor whose recklessness is surpassed only by his corruption. [Help me fight Newsom’s reckless abuses](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv_IPFMzzv9WmdPghwMBSwX0KOu7WTw5uuSoUQzsIZxhqw&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_111&n=3) [Share this Post on Facebook](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAyvFtDkwpnR-oxYU8S6KlulJUZpUFvis7HXe5rX11PE4g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_111&n=4) Kevin Kiley
[](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=yFGvxrZFfEAGNDSajUG67jFpOTi1EXIJZKzd_Af4NVQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_111&n=5)California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Assembly 2022 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_oct_111&n=6).

| **Weekly Newsletter ******
---
_**Note from Chairman Stepanek **_**_Weekly Governor's Glance _****_Upcoming Events _****_House Republican Update _****_Senate Republican Update _****_Republican Spotlight_**** _Noteworthy News_**** _NHGOP Tweets _
****NH Federation of Republican Women****NH Young Republicans****NH Federation of College Republicans**** **
---
|
---
| **Derek,****

Last night, the Democrat agenda in D.C. completely crumbled and our feckless Representatives and Senators did nothing while their party failed to get anything done.

This is what we can expect from Democrat government: they waste everyone’s time and fail to implement their unpopular agenda.

While we can be relieved the Democrats’ massive $3.5 trillion boondoggle is delayed for now, we must remain ever vigilant. Please continue to call and email Chris Pappas, Ann Kuster, Maggie Hassan, and Jeanne Shaheen to showcase your opposition to this massive spending package. While we can be grateful for Democrats like Joe Manchin and Krysten Sinema for representing their states well, we should be utterly disappointed in the New Hampshire Democrats who were seemingly willing to go along with such a massive and permanent transformation of government.

Closer to home here in New Hampshire, we’ve seen angry and loud crowds distort and obstruct our Republican messaging and governance. Let us not forget that President Trump oversaw the successful creation and deployment of our COVID-19 vaccines through Operation Warp Speed. Republicans of all stripes vehemently oppose vaccine mandates and we are fighting in unison against the Federal government and the Democrats’ overreach. Our Attorney General has joined a multi-state lawsuit against Joe Biden’s mandate and our Governor and legislative leadership has been united in opposition against forced vaccinations.

Let us praise the work of Republican leadership that produced successful and effective vaccines against COVID-19 - Democrat misinformation regarding the efficacy of the vaccine should not deter us. I chose to get the vaccine and I encourage all to as well and we recognize the right of everyone to make the decision that is best for them and their families.

Today also marks the reduction of New Hampshire’s rooms and meals tax that was made possible through our Republican budget. Thanks to our Republican majorities in the House and Senate and Governor Chris Sununu’s leadership, we passed a budget that includes tax cuts for everyone!
****
We have one week to go until our big Amos Tuck Dinner with rising star U.S. Senator Tim Scott -**[**if you haven’t gotten your tickets yet, get them tonight at $100 before they increase to $125 at midnight.**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.nh.gop%2Famostuckdinner/1/0100017c3d79d4a9-25ba9b50-0b4b-4f31-a0b0-2d409bd82d2a-000000/LkYBthGT2i4yH1cmiCXiA8goWx8=238)**We have a great crowd coming and you will not want to miss out. **

---
---
| **Stephan Stepanek
NHGOP Chairman **

| **Thanks to the state budget we recently passed, Laconia taxpayers will save more than $1.25 million under the Statewide Property Tax. That’s direct relief for taxpayers, but the budget also helps property taxpayers in other ways by sharing funds with cities and towns.

For instance, we’ve increased revenue sharing under the Meals and Rooms Tax to 30 percent. That will mean more than $1.1 million going directly to Laconia in each of the next two years, helping to lower taxes. In addition, the two-year budget includes more than $23 million in Adequate Education Grants for Laconia schools.

I’m happy that our state budget is great news for hard working Laconia families.**
**Sen. Harold French****Canterbury**

| **The New Hampshire Federation of College Republicans is the officially chartered state organization for College Republicans all over the state of New Hampshire. With chapters at Saint Anselm College, Plymouth State, UNH, SNHU, Dartmouth, Franklin Pierce, and Keene State, the NHFCR has representation for a wide swath of the state. Executive board members include Chairman Ben Mickens, Executive Director Joseph LaCreta, Vice-Chair for CD1 Nate Twarog, Vice-Chair for CD2 John Michitson, Treasurer Kevin Chrisom, and Secretary Jessica Long. Our chapters are driven to keep college students engaged with conservative politics by bringing speakers to campus, presenting students with conservative internship opportunities in the state, and doing grassroots campaigning. The Federation board looks forward to helping get our chapters to a post-COVID reality while we work to keep Republican leadership in Concord as we push for Republican leadership in DC. **

body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=511adc3fec0c44a59a0fb04b6620491e&_e=cQLsN2l8HT8DpcNspTo9MkuIBRf9xXIzH5ZYxxHtkcwQFf3wPq-e8UKgRiOpBSZK-StGx58mGSUi1kIE4bjLNV1btq9xTnfm0SFUCCqsQrp1BDs61PYQ6SYs2jaL7vdYZtOu9R38YcvsRVhrY6tuIP3-kN9EaJcP8_oD5yYt0b9LCA_Rkq0NyEkUtXroop8XspDGXuHdBtj85_jeAdvsDbMi8vsgD0DbuWT9_HBoaMh244XbQ1jc_ScQeBbogHeF2_TyWKOluBUw-wI8OG8NKdlOco9866PL9fnx0xQF7jZjF9ZJ85eBocihz_SvUyR4_pzU6J9t4RmMddq6MplB-QYbqtf24bXEz21Qt5aPJ3dGEdjeBZwcWMAwyWtnVZ0PY-0odzDhFV6g9tZ863JZZ4dWbjhnEv2Qk_ZYIBshhdSo6aMpDCSuwI3rhfR6OcM6PzQDHbOTnScK3u2DjNUPMRU3sLlYn9Z821UVxGzVXBI%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=511adc3fec0c44a59a0fb04b6620491e&_e=cQLsN2l8HT8DpcNspTo9MkuIBRf9xXIzH5ZYxxHtkcwQFf3wPq-e8UKgRiOpBSZK-StGx58mGSUi1kIE4bjLNV1btq9xTnfm0SFUCCqsQrp1BDs61PYQ6SYs2jaL7vdYZtOu9R38YcvsRVhrY6tuIP3-kN9EaJcP8_oD5yYt0b9LCA_Rkq0NyEkUtXroop8XspDGXuHdBtj85_jeAdvsDbMi8vsgD0DbuWT9_HBoaMh244XbQ1jc_ScQeBbogHeF2_TyWKOluBUw-wI8OG8NKfI94zUdTMnYu6CGrbN6SF3L738_lEI_XZJTDV5PTT1p8FAFh_GYv_WNaHcvrYs8OHOcJv3InZBNtHVq87OQZpCpVnnA6I9JPU0JnhYBuOwGRmnFp5jtkAuChvUYbC30hmOdZ85DhoLb-iGqR14oWQI-Oi40Pkc_xzGzDTZl0nKgE5IurkXeI2MG8cZk9xT5IdeYlbkO_LV9S6LgARYr7Dk%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=511adc3fec0c44a59a0fb04b6620491e&_e=cQLsN2l8HT8DpcNspTo9MkuIBRf9xXIzH5ZYxxHtkcwQFf3wPq-e8UKgRiOpBSZK-StGx58mGSUi1kIE4bjLNV1btq9xTnfm0SFUCCqsQrp1BDs61PYQ6SYs2jaL7vdYZtOu9R38YcvsRVhrY6tuIP3-kN9EaJcP8_oD5yYt0b9LCA_Rkq0NyEkUtXroop8XspDGXuHdBtj85_jeAdvsDbMi8vsgD0DbuWT9_HBoaMh244XbQ1jc_ScQeBbogHeF2_TyWKOluBUw-wI8OG8NKQA60Whs8qbKNHerI-BjB9lO9ia4kMlQCYZprGeYPLYkYiN3hFIdAoHrxDlQeKnvO-vNNb2mj4YuyRbwEHMKBG4Sy704ecJ7DxilSzCbVCzbXzY-tXYF23TINY3s6c4UQrxzVmjhZffs1gasMG9vHGK3aFjLw4klS6KEuPd7uYRqemBd1EAfUPeiyBdxJAkU6rOeIStp7eQSCocegpYmUlM%3D)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=511adc3fec0c44a59a0fb04b6620491e&_e=cQLsN2l8HT8DpcNspTo9MkuIBRf9xXIzH5ZYxxHtkcwQFf3wPq-e8UKgRiOpBSZK-StGx58mGSUi1kIE4bjLNV1btq9xTnfm0SFUCCqsQrp1BDs61PYQ6SYs2jaL7vdYZtOu9R38YcvsRVhrY6tuIP3-kN9EaJcP8_oD5yYt0b9LCA_Rkq0NyEkUtXroop8XspDGXuHdBtj85_jeAdvsDbMi8vsgD0DbuWT9_HBoaMh244XbQ1jc_ScQeBbogHeF2_TyWKOluBUw-wI8OG8NKSgTsAOTiY6Rninazr6_Qqw0R35cTXR6BCGsPcLLCUzQTp0ruX90sCFv3bPuhnTXZPdZ0ovw6WBFOAajDzRZ-lJBqLdQC8HU_5WwHA9w-IDAFQAzdO5Cc5MI0xM-ChR9l4mmQpftsovgGU_AueonAchq6ZtgS17niRWkrVd_Ujkk8NyDuLqEx6y0E47Lcc24vHbzRTZPp63-7ZJpzcZTH0g%3D) **

clean_body: If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! | Fellow Conservative, I’ve been on a lot of teams. From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, I know what makes a good teammate. We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win. Fellow Conservative, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia. I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington. He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government. This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. Georgians deserve better.America deserves better. As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Fellow Conservative. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team. I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Fellow Conservative, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority. Thanks, Herschel Walker Republican for United States Senate | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. **Democrats Failure To Lead Is Leading Us To Failure 👎**

Yesterday, the House of Representatives [voted](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=74cc0a2167144a70b8b8a87d49fed30a&_e=Uq7jYLGp2RsbmaK8NLfvLC0zrN1NL8abKvAE1PAw43rB-cVkzM35ccM_OsVefEuFG4OUbvZAUBMoHvC-vHPp_9Ua0PND1j6flyEKregBsarKi4nMIx1q2zjp5Qh1QZTZljlzH1rOqoyavcoxFGteMQEhw3tObN9ClX4rbDxsfxthg58RgtVMkNkMZhBr0HPJ6te-imgHtNKhTJsAkOVm9MIvyFXJLUwE9df48DC-CnXN6hiGjNU_W2TUnFGc4r8sBgsevE32psXQP7Yq7MsH4N1t_V1lPRv7-OG7jmfHVgWLuN5pEzvxBNgA3GFjsdS_dh0hjxWdVg38PBVOzb_2Y5RHtWSpEr9KorCV9jWfZi8%3D) to kick the can down the road...for two months. Members voted to pass a short-term spending bill to fund the government through December 3 of this year. That means, in two short months, Congress will do the same crisis dance all over again, and will do nothing to reform our government’s out-of-control spending.

Meanwhile, Nancy Pelosi’s Democratic Caucus is imploding because it’s increasingly controlled by the radical Progressive Caucus that prevents Congress from getting anything done. [Moderate Democrats intend to block](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=74cc0a2167144a70b8b8a87d49fed30a&_e=Uq7jYLGp2RsbmaK8NLfvLB4PmlBwaG6NusCuWuiY28HyrTQVbJSB7Q_lJ7WP-_6uH666A90byMQVHKCXzlVC1gQ0nHZo_LZ4jOrWddmyJe-rp8NERmC5mx44LDYbszh1KRYV8xA6b146bMJgvjMMdjNKeMrEJbJHF8Fkk29eZX0id2mEUC-FiRbfB4D8AHb1uEiVe62oN9iwOV0gB8VF7jvaVyfcw8_I7NIEm-pBqwCI6z3RT3NJ9ON9rZTiQz3o280iZCnM7UOpIIp_L14aMGqtIgQOVxqGYiXnlQhsYLvP5TQWsIE1xdv8Ww5wWN3DOrXbHCCfj83ih0QwkPoYefTSde3nheHm-4XHI9Gcl5xdLdO620-JwaSoz9m_lZqi) the fiscal insanity known as the $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill until Congress passes a $1 trillion “infrastructure” package, and the far-left threatens to [block the infrastructure package](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=74cc0a2167144a70b8b8a87d49fed30a&_e=Uq7jYLGp2RsbmaK8NLfvLBISVl_dgHslNxYqnbaYnJ-QYJTU-W-RkSbD2I1Q7y28HsymOA9rwe0JCiK15vC-TGjhEIqyK7WsjIF0CapSiiZA2EoQqXUg77qlfwOZ0A8OzPdikE7Jq9XxgolXncNytgiN5c3OWoHutvpVNMaK4MLbxnKG4FZFny1eJe32vuhBj9hheNSDIWfxhqQSxHju5JV305GfEe0h9UlFZpmzX9oBoT7BBm9cby8cCQ-8etfYEtEwstNCYGjn1yx08X4KtuLg18mFkt8GbsEZE0PXwuz3t9Bhrt1TWu_CSZzEDICxiFfwqsfTm4LBkU00ddlaDg%3D%3D) until Congress passes the reconciliation bill.

The result? Our national defense suffers, REAL infrastructure suffers, and the American people are left taking a backseat to Pelosi’s socialist agenda.

A $125 million investment and 750 jobs are coming to Blount County, Tennessee. Those numbers alone will have a lot of people excited in East Tennessee. But when we hear that the new jobs are coming from gun manufacturer Smith and Wesson, well, we’re just over the moon.

Smith and Wesson is moving to Tennessee from Massachusetts, and we can totally understand why: a pro-business, pro-Second Amendment state is a win-win for the company.

name: Rob Secaur
subject: Weekly Update from the Campaign Trail
body:
Jane Timken for Ohio Update [](https://) Dear Peter, Another exciting week is in the books for the true America First, grassroots candidate for U.S. Senate, Jane Timken. After a successful Super Saturday and surpassing 500,000 voter contacts, Jane toured the state with America First warrior Governor Kristi Noem. With campaign stops in Athens, Franklin, Hamilton, Preble, Logan, Montgomery, Summit, Allen, and Delaware Counties, Jane continues to take her message directly to voters and prove to them that she will work hard as their voice in Washington. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. **Biden's Open Border Hypocrisy is Beyond the Pale** This week, the Cincinnati Enquirer featured an op-ed from Jane on Joe Biden’s rank hypocrisy when it comes to his open border policy. “Fourteen thousand illegal immigrants packed together at the border in Del Rio, Texas. Makeshift tents housing children in 100-plus-degree heat. Hundreds of migrants literally walking across the Rio Grande into the United States – the vast majority untested, unvaccinated and unvetted.

If pictures are worth a thousand words, these paint a stunning portrayal of President Joe Biden’s total and abject failure to secure the U.S.-Mexico border and protect our national sovereignty.

However, compare this to the authoritarian mandates Biden has implemented on Americans, and the story becomes even more shocking. To be clear, in Biden’s America, this is the reality:

Mask mandates in schools? Yes. But masks at the border or at Hollywood award shows? No.

Vaccine mandates for workers, businesses and immigrants LEGALLY coming into the United States? Yes. But vaccine mandates for ILLEGAL immigrants flowing into our country in masses? No.

"It’s not the same thing," says White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki.

The hypocrisy is beyond the pale.” [Read the full piece here.](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3fcf7b3db82d43ce8cfa87a28063bb88&_e=iVDAjNVVX0WkFJE3K94R8k9-fPu_aM7KvFdIzVOaMCNKCQjrR5n02laGVzLL_BNk0XJs6I6VzBkLUbTUgOTNKXgl0EOxsr8Otavn8OZQ8fhL7qqp4clTWYw5HBkqfO9tHJ4E1OJQJALStgFBleXVieqjW51HM-TdZkLWfK99t2HexIP8_bJkIwasG6q8Z2xwepbqjTAa9-mjS-KFlT0EgxFx16hkK4r-i7MWLJZaANervFTj5AhSe5UJ2ccMCGDG56Dd8fponhEFjig2MlyGY3R69awA6riY25ZTU99-YxfxHJuDgfLiMF7QaCOKq40qLM0Fa7xh9zAHfcK8eW-reIPEmHTaPM5OH1QpTPL5c9ML6nvWSQBDbVSf8CWMShEe) **From The Trail** Last Saturday, our campaign surpassed **500,000** **voter contacts** for the election cycle. Our campaign remains the only one in this race with a substantial, statewide ground game and we are not slowing down any time soon. Jane made stops in Athens, Columbus, and Cincinnati to rally our interns and volunteers as they took Jane’s message directly to voters. On Monday night, Jane traveled to Eaton to meet and greet with supporters and talk about the issues important to them. It’s always great to be in Preble County with new and old friends! On Tuesday afternoon, Jane was thrilled to join Bellefontaine Mayor Ben Stahler. Jane shared her vision for the U.S. Senate and heard about the issues affecting Logan County. Later on Tuesday, Jane joined conservative women from six counties in Beavercreek for a Women for Jane event. Thank you to CJ Bieghler and Jo Broughton for putting on a great event! On Wednesday and Thursday, Jane was joined by America First warrior and South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem with stops in Cincinnati, Columbus, and Lima. Voters across the state were thrilled to see two strong, conservative women who will fight for their values and rights. Special thanks to Allen County GOP Chairman Keith Cheney for putting on some great events and showing the state that Allen County is Jane Country. **Media Roundup** While Jane was busy crisscrossing the state this week, she also had time to share her America First message with media outlets across the state. As part of our Super Saturday, Jane visited Athens and sat down with [Athens News](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3fcf7b3db82d43ce8cfa87a28063bb88&_e=riHnP9AbKmhYxwiGIivya8xu51a_RUgIW2E9x6o4kairhhycJ2f97IwRPf9G1D4uJb7tNHT0uUSgAHltC2PMQ_H5JH3LrLX_V96tG0tRa4jdHqOIu9GnCfTAD4ptDe0v6qK4j_GuhMRuQ10jAnUnKdXGYnpatzgNwUaJF95gq1OM8mbpZ4W8IW4hfud8jFgfT8xJ9haWdjEQj63enpCFZuD60Hf4uNfSSKlNwMilrTxxK77RoFdWRphygkvP6nWmWVDzfnERpfx_s3Tj0feyyg%3D%3D): "Timken claimed that the First and Second amendments — guaranteeing freedom of speech and the right to bear arms — were 'under attack.' "It’s about the future of our country." Jane joined the Ruthless Podcast this week to discuss the race for U.S. Senate, her vision, and to have some fun. If you’ve ever wondered what Jane’s last meal would be, find your answer by clicking and listening below: [](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3fcf7b3db82d43ce8cfa87a28063bb88&_e=riHnP9AbKmhYxwiGIivya99jKpmUTH001ll68crT5WC06P1qQaHn5YyJeDjW4KyEAuwNMC1RdY3o4QLfDmdEV1Hvh35y-M9ZjiepOoVmRJ4sN9VWdSRKdCbkiUM6ZKqZGngLvmn2Ck3K2Xd5mjO-qpxQh6DtEOI6VV6DO8E1cE3DYHyntJ1cuie4EnlGvaz3vHRPHJ9fiilZChMFdVaMCeAN597PcBc6S04S0zmq_PgqvnQEmviuBYQm5PQ2Xam6LTI9X2OLda-OVt77fSZgb7zQohQ1L8YyDvzYuTwk0LE%3D) With two days packed with great events, Gov. Noem’s trip to Ohio to support Jane garnered media from across the state. We are thrilled to have Gov. Noem’s strong endorsement and below you can see just why the Gov. came to Ohio and supports Jane. [WATCH: Spectrum News Columbus](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3fcf7b3db82d43ce8cfa87a28063bb88&_e=Nd5hF_FA-t2NS46ZzKIpkXATVyTlEmpN4qDazulRlJsq1XlSJyYwjQrbQmXlHUNbKDLxS0eB0NMHn9zhMOq6VdZIGErEIoN7R6BqowAxTJf0pNfO5nAaYS87mS2-GHZmNFORv2oZaBo-iW71JltwlKIXSoCXpba-jH-nyQCms9zzssxuT6p0mWj21VCLo3GixxjpPPcd_bCXAByKcjJ53N18fSrTWj9WuwOoqIOnFvKNLipgpuaD8aORBq4wdXkrhxMdSkAN_nEB-x3kTbc5afVu-K90kUIY4ts48-gjZfTlEj1HysIforegkkVRxB6WvVHYhCK7AngoeeT84VrSaRrNp5XDg_LpiM2J_V2f0jsidf-mAVZLyuU4JYncwNcP4tWjGttqAw33P5_0g0azMeYrIqPePEwmk1tAnZh2zLiAiqbxhhl41S3Q3i8kW4SdTIMjPYeuqkDGxpgL7OEaQmzc9P9Qw3LvAPdiDCEdmSA5p1ZolXA8Rtrx0XdKorzLETPELuSU4DXg69lFL9xUDScPsc1CpvG7XIPzyR6QP2QsxA0zQbwZTgwr33j4u2JxwDcU-7W-k9UcyToeXdU-V-5BkLxLda0gK9AlPHKw0cZmWgiJuGfGp-OGXZcTtifkAvZTb2wBrV4fpbqzxG4zgcbcIaZWCA0b3fKhlOq-yZDUWRyRW0YIpkmxLDgpI9k6HV98dCroTbgbRknZI8HrdRug_ONKw8nXOD1uXrBwb7zZhke8zS1BvlEEg85VRzP4)
**Noem: **"She stood up for the policies that Donald Trump worked for each and every day. She made a difference and she'll make a huge impact in the United States Senate. We need people that are tough, but we also need someone with a mother's heart." [READ: Lima News](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3fcf7b3db82d43ce8cfa87a28063bb88&_e=Nd5hF_FA-t2NS46ZzKIpkXATVyTlEmpN4qDazulRlJsq1XlSJyYwjQrbQmXlHUNbKDLxS0eB0NMHn9zhMOq6VdZIGErEIoN7R6BqowAxTJf0pNfO5nAaYS87mS2-GHZmNFORv2oZaBo-iW71JltwlKIXSoCXpba-jH-nyQCms9zzssxuT6p0mWj21VCLo3GiZIhJuB7GtPDFh87Er8xvenTRQ0epDB0sC9Zqb5esHbPpy7nm_PPoafChk4OQ_iGdI4OpQ08lXn-EIPIef9GsUmuMFJshM_KktGyKbUjuVJrI37PKo4NTxTjM1vT41YhuceZZHn2lvvjvxSPeO8vyDfphzZwRoPS-rxH0IX-pfqr6o24bhdhKZF222mKznLquSG834mcC1rUKFvYF2b8q3jFoLhgETIP4iKD2W4wQkh6IyjZvIpMq0F5YHyrhSmh54EOAPeaESULQbDFfGgSiAvAncs4y-9NKlyBbzIFq9Hi1CFNpY_E65OTQ7YlZxPiRZAof2yw5pt6FaZ3AniPMBZRyzUhE9WjJAjNkPwVz1mwcSmDTN-ftchgq2mQp0wmgG6KOmvdLKGlUflNboWLNRy_b_rW3Ffg6vHqUbEOVEDOWLG0WlKliR65uG6pBsumL_PF9eokuRP3WriJvC3eeGyHBT6ZE9mv5xkOOqvwjaJ-LHoOF9iyjH7KyFRFsarAjW-cPRAIyaS3DHAihJc8EFobmUc2PCC5fQw6p4oZX1nJ5l-a9Kb2bfVmc7DECOo0-gf75ilV69gxD060MUW49XMmBHEIHP79wswiT-qzme3h8qrqCT3vvgUf9FO2PQAVZ3kjnVWdarxcp6elLSg8jsnlm5peUKNIIuUH0nLQwPpE%3D)
"As the pair have traveled across the state together, it’s clear that one of the country’s most conservative governors has given a full backing to Timken’s campaign."

“I really believe in Jane,” Noem said. “I think she’s a hard worker, she makes good decisions. She’d be a really wonderful United States Senator from the great state of Ohio.” [WATCH: Lima ](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=3fcf7b3db82d43ce8cfa87a28063bb88&_e=Nd5hF_FA-t2NS46ZzKIpkXATVyTlEmpN4qDazulRlJsq1XlSJyYwjQrbQmXlHUNbKDLxS0eB0NMHn9zhMOq6VdZIGErEIoN7R6BqowAxTJf0pNfO5nAaYS87mS2-GHZmNFORv2oZaBo-iW71JltwlKIXSoCXpba-jH-nyQCms9zzssxuT6p0mWj21VCLo3Gi6NsFMUC860jiMEAVdUdXfLHABh8EiVp9xkzTtj4PkJ7_Nz-UnM2JChP3wIHsCEtRUJGGzWqcGKJP3VMTbDURqfIv9J19QVq7OXsVYIVAk5aB1sOX6jVJXY1CMoerHpqyMZyxu_tWTMIntzCOd_NUKcfg-1VZnAXVMFebsdUa7sezoFpsqHJmz21TPb7sfnT7m1BCq95fdY2ge6MSUdhl1-CmyvGa_Y259gbDP37c0rI78gtcw00uKqt6TC7Ut8VqMeroTL6KNiSeb3a1JxNsjKCa8izHXMfLoSXpa8OZ1i16zZSt1O4mj2sBGlKc-k0D44Sc3mdDuRve0JbxcM-IXWd_O8zqjsX4Nm3IrIndqyb5G0-FlRx2R9hQ_cZrnZLcp6hASJq1JaxCuEq7lDGqRWVUEAIP1Ely7zxCiEeoImYZRizsM5Tofba0-gZEXGn2g-XMCG3ZWWAWUlegKPkjkYqWbPJiP7knZZ8hLH-wRzWToDUG7rcFGlyeZUriXjSTce-kRVBYFOgazosbDYkwLBOGtb9YYFiEOwbw5y_sWpGQexuboxFx43jQ9OAbY6nELlX7W-BReUWqjU5Xze5DOjC6J7UK_5LB6RRKQ3vL1pZjXk_OcNV2PVn5nl94Mo9f)
**Noem:** “Every political adviser that I have has said to me ‘why would you get involved’ in a U.S. Senate race with so many candidates...’ I’ll tell you why - it matters. I don’t know the other people very well but I've done a lot of research - I know you have a quitter in there...I don’t want a quitter in the U.S. Senate. When there’s a fight going on I want them in the fight until we win...I’ve worked with this lady for years, and she does not quit.”

clean_body: Jane Timken for Ohio Update https:// Dear Peter, Another exciting week is in the books for the true America First, grassroots candidate for U.S. Senate, Jane Timken. After a successful Super Saturday and surpassing 500,000 voter contacts, Jane toured the state with America First warrior Governor Kristi Noem. With campaign stops in Athens, Franklin, Hamilton, Preble, Logan, Montgomery, Summit, Allen, and Delaware Counties, Jane continues to take her message directly to voters and prove to them that she will work hard as their voice in Washington. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to learn more. Biden's Open Border Hypocrisy is Beyond the Pale This week, the Cincinnati Enquirer featured an op-ed from Jane on Joe Biden’s rank hypocrisy when it comes to his open border policy. “Fourteen thousand illegal immigrants packed together at the border in Del Rio, Texas. Makeshift tents housing children in 100-plus-degree heat. Hundreds of migrants literally walking across the Rio Grande into the United States – the vast majority untested, unvaccinated and unvetted. If pictures are worth a thousand words, these paint a stunning portrayal of President Joe Biden’s total and abject failure to secure the U.S.-Mexico border and protect our national sovereignty. However, compare this to the authoritarian mandates Biden has implemented on Americans, and the story becomes even more shocking. To be clear, in Biden’s America, this is the reality: Mask mandates in schools? Yes. But masks at the border or at Hollywood award shows? No. Vaccine mandates for workers, businesses and immigrants LEGALLY coming into the United States? Yes. But vaccine mandates for ILLEGAL immigrants flowing into our country in masses? No. "It’s not the same thing," says White House Press Secretary Jen Psaki. The hypocrisy is beyond the pale.” From The Trail Last Saturday, our campaign surpassed 500,000 voter contacts for the election cycle. Our campaign remains the only one in this race with a substantial, statewide ground game and we are not slowing down any time soon. Jane made stops in Athens, Columbus, and Cincinnati to rally our interns and volunteers as they took Jane’s message directly to voters. On Monday night, Jane traveled to Eaton to meet and greet with supporters and talk about the issues important to them. It’s always great to be in Preble County with new and old friends! On Tuesday afternoon, Jane was thrilled to join Bellefontaine Mayor Ben Stahler. Jane shared her vision for the U.S. Senate and heard about the issues affecting Logan County. Later on Tuesday, Jane joined conservative women from six counties in Beavercreek for a Women for Jane event. Thank you to CJ Bieghler and Jo Broughton for putting on a great event! On Wednesday and Thursday, Jane was joined by America First warrior and South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem with stops in Cincinnati, Columbus, and Lima. Voters across the state were thrilled to see two strong, conservative women who will fight for their values and rights. Special thanks to Allen County GOP Chairman Keith Cheney for putting on some great events and showing the state that Allen County is Jane Country. Media Roundup While Jane was busy crisscrossing the state this week, she also had time to share her America First message with media outlets across the state. As part of our Super Saturday, Jane visited Athens and sat down with : "Timken claimed that the First and Second amendments — guaranteeing freedom of speech and the right to bear arms — were 'under attack.' "It’s about the future of our country." Jane joined the Ruthless Podcast this week to discuss the race for U.S. Senate, her vision, and to have some fun. If you’ve ever wondered what Jane’s last meal would be, find your answer by clicking and listening below: With two days packed with great events, Gov. Noem’s trip to Ohio to support Jane garnered media from across the state. We are thrilled to have Gov. Noem’s strong endorsement and below you can see just why the Gov. came to Ohio and supports Jane. Noem: "She stood up for the policies that Donald Trump worked for each and every day. She made a difference and she'll make a huge impact in the United States Senate. We need people that are tough, but we also need someone with a mother's heart." "As the pair have traveled across the state together, it’s clear that one of the country’s most conservative governors has given a full backing to Timken’s campaign." “I really believe in Jane,” Noem said. “I think she’s a hard worker, she makes good decisions. She’d be a really wonderful United States Senator from the great state of Ohio.” Noem: “Every political adviser that I have has said to me ‘why would you get involved’ in a U.S. Senate race with so many candidates...’ I’ll tell you why - it matters. I don’t know the other people very well but I've done a lot of research - I know you have a quitter in there...I don’t want a quitter in the U.S. Senate. When there’s a fight going on I want them in the fight until we win...I’ve worked with this lady for years, and she does not quit.” Noem: “It’s really important that everybody puts the right people in these positions of powers during this time in our country. It's something we've learned in the last year, year and a half, is that leadership has consequences and the decisions that our leaders make has a big impact on people's day to day lives." Saving America's Ballot Box In a new opinion piece featured on Steve Bannon’s War Room, Jane took the mainstream media and Democrats to task for their silence after the Arizona audit report proved unequivocally that there was serious fraud that deeply affected Arizona’s election results. “If we don’t have safe, secure, and fair elections, then the very foundation of our Republic is threatened. While Democrats are trying to take that right away from Americans who don’t share their views with their election rigging schemes, desire to codify the disastrous policies of 2020, and implement a federal takeover of our elections, I will always stand for the integrity of America’s ballot box. I don’t just use election integrity as a buzzword or a rallying cry – I’ve actually worked to secure elections. But this wouldn’t have been possible without a safe and secure election. It is absolutely critical that we investigate every instance of fraud, restore confidence in our elections, and get to the bottom of every legal vote in the 2020 election. | _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathan=20Hochman=20for=20Attorney=20General=202022?=
subject: Nathan Hochman Endorsed by Former United States Attorney General Michael Mukasey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
body:
Former United States Attorney General Michael Mukasey has announced his support for Nathan Hochman in the 2022 race for California Attorney General. | | | [Peter, to v](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4438014?e=94837ebab3)[iew this email in ](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4438014?e=94837ebab3)[your](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4438014?e=94837ebab3)[ browser](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4438014?e=94837ebab3)[, click here.](https://mailchi.mp/nathanhochman/nathan-hochman-announces-campaign-for-california-attorney-general-4438014?e=94837ebab3)
---
| |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
October 1, 2021
---
Contact:
press@nathanhochman.com
---
| **Nathan Hochman Endorsed by Former United States Attorney General Michael Mukasey**
---
| **Los Angeles, CA –** Judge Michael Mukasey, who served as the 81st Attorney General of the United States and Chief Judge of the US District Court for the Southern District of New York, has endorsed Nathan Hochman, as he runs to succeed Newsom-appointed California Attorney General Rob Bonta in 2022.

In announcing his endorsement, Judge Mukasey stated: _“As the Assistant Attorney General heading up the U.S. Department of Justice’s Tax Division while I was the Attorney General, Nathan was an effective leader of over 350 lawyers engaged in the government’s civil, criminal and appellate tax litigation throughout the country. His effectiveness derived in large part because not only is he a superb lawyer, he is a superb human being. From both a professional and a personal standpoint, I cannot think of anyone who is as qualified as Nathan to become California’s next Attorney General. I strongly endorse his candidacy.”_

In response to the support, Hochman stated _“Earning Judge Mukasey’s endorsement is special for me. Judge Mukasey oversaw the Justice Department when I was appointed and confirmed as Assistant United States Attorney General. During that difficult time in our nation’s history, we worked together to ensure justice for all. In California, we once again face difficult times and I thank him for his support in my race.”_

Nathan served under AG Mukasey after being appointed by President Bush and confirmed by the US Senate as Assistant US Attorney General. Outside his experience at DOJ, Nathan is an experienced prosecutor, defense attorney, and civic leader. After earning his law degree from Stanford Law School, Hochman clerked for a Los Angeles US District Court and as an Assistant US Attorney for the Central District of California. Nathan has served his community on numerous charitable boards and as a member and President of the Los Angeles City Ethics Commission.

Since launching his campaign at the end of April, Hochman has raised over a million dollars and received endorsements from prominent elected officials and prosecutors—establishing himself as the leading Republican challenger to Gavin Newsom-appointed Attorney General Rob Bonta in the 2022 election.

For updates on this campaign, visit [NathanHochman.com](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=a83d03080c&e=94837ebab3) or follow Nathan Hochman for Attorney General on [Facebook](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=02ed18003e&e=94837ebab3), [Twitter](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=c04210e58d&e=94837ebab3), [Instagram](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=63869b37ff&e=94837ebab3) and [TikTok](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=4a8c097f93&e=94837ebab3). ###
---
| | Paid for by Nathan Hochman for Attorney General 2022
FPPC ID 1437955

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5e18d418e9&e=94837ebab3&c=9876d337c1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://axiomstrategies.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=634ddc357d96a36fb118fa25c&id=5e18d418e9&e=94837ebab3&c=9876d337c1).

We know for sure that Donald Trump is going to go ALL OUT to help DeSantis win, so we need to start fighting back today by building a massive coalition of good Democratic supporters. Please, consider making a . Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and ensure that we can implement our entire strategy to crush Ron DeSantis, make a. to request fewer emails. subject: Is Joe Biden doing a good job?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
🚩Our country under Democrat control is becoming unrecognizable, unsafe, and unaffordable for regular families. | | | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=56ff2ed596&e=1050d051da)
---
| | | Patriot,

Rep. Jake LaTurner and Republicans in Congress are fighting for us, and _**we want to hear from you.**_

**Do you approve of Joe Biden's first 9 months as president?[Answer Now!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=309cdd5bc7&e=1050d051da)**

So far, we've seen:
1\. A failure in Afghanistan, which has led to the **deaths of brave soldiers and has left Americans stranded in enemy territory for over a month.**
2\. **Rising inflation and reckless spending** , hurting all Americans.
3\. **Unconstitutional vaccine mandates** , after promising there would be none.
4\. An unending **border crisis** , with thousands being allowed into our nation with no accountability.

And that's just the start of a _**long list of crises that were created by the Biden administration.**_

Joe Biden has been in the White House for 9 months. Do you think he's doing a good job?
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c708b9b0d2&e=1050d051da)

| **Our country under Democrat control is becoming unrecognizable, unsafe, and unaffordable for regular families.**

Under Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi, we see crises ignored, taxes raised, wasteful spending, and unconstitutional power-grabs.

Yours in the fight,

Team LaTurner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: Out of control spending, Radical Nation book tour...
body:
Hearings on Capitol Hill and more. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/66e8d5f72727/out-of-control-spending-radical-nation-book-tour?e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
## Out of control government spending...
The Democrats spending is absolutely out of control. Senator Lankford joined us last night to break it down, watch below.
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=438b3fecb2&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
## _Radical Nation_ events...
We’re starting to add events to the _Radical Nation_ book tour this fall, check out the events below to join us and if there’s somewhere I should add, send an email to [Contact@SeanSpicer.com](mailto:Contact@SeanSpicer.com).**Friday, October 15th** — Franklin County GOP Eisenhower DinnerGreencastle, PA — Tickets [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=6bcfbf9f3f&e=f6564bbe3b).**Friday, October 22nd** – Radical Nation Heritage FoundationWashington, DC – More info to come**Tuesday, October 26th** – Book Signing at Books and GreetingsNorthvale, NJ – More info [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b2423a8d89&e=f6564bbe3b)**Wednesday, October 27th** — New York Metropolitan Republican ClubNew York City, NY — Tickets [here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7cb2141665&e=f6564bbe3b).
| | | |
---
## Hearings over botched Afghanistan withdrawal on Capitol Hill this week...
General Milley, General McKenzie and Secretary Lloyd Austin were on Capitol Hill to answer questions over the Afghanistan withdrawal. We had Senator Graham on _Spicer & Co_ this week to react to some of the news out of those hearings, watch below:
| | | |
---
## Stories I’m reading...
[McDonald’s is bringing back the McRib — again](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=07385fd7de&e=f6564bbe3b) — via YahooBeen told on Instagram that I have to try this... Maybe this year is the year.
|
---
[Anti-School Choice Terry McAuliffe’s Wife Chaired Trustee Board at Kids’ Private School ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=51df74f7e9&e=f6564bbe3b)— via TownhallTerry McAuliffe opposes school choice and parental involvement in schools but sends his kids to an expensive elite private school.
|
---
[Don’t Believe Democrats When They Say a $3.5T Bill Costs Nothing ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=9b78933097&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Politico That ranks among the most shameless attempts to change reality through a talking point ever attempted. If you buy that then you probably believe you can break a cookie and the calories will fall out.
|
---
[Kamala Harris’ office frustrated with ‘The View’ after last week’s Covid fiasco, sources say](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=0ab36cc78f&e=f6564bbe3b) — via CNNHmm... the sanctimonious folks at ‘The View’ lied to Kamala Harris... between this, the GMA sexual harassment stuff and Chris Cuomo allegations — bad week for ABC.
| | | |
---
Last week I asked if you thought that Biden’s spending plan would be signed into law, [most people said no](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5ecafd5057&e=f6564bbe3b), stay tuned. This week on _Spicer & Co_ we had Dog the Bounty Hunter who has joined the manhunt to find Brian Laundrie, a fugitive person of interest in the death of his fiancé. So I want to know:
[](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=85cc2ad6ba&e=f6564bbe3b)
| | | |
---
| | | | | | [](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=5a57a7dc54&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
|
## Pre-order _Radical Nation_ ...
“Joe Biden never intended to unify the country and if you’re concerned about where his policies will lead us and want to know what it takes to push back, you must read _**RADICAL NATION**_.” **— DANA LOESCH, NATIONALLY SYNDICATED HOST OF** _**THE DANA SHOW**_ Thank you to everyone who has already pre-ordered.|
---
[Get a copy here](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=1dc58e7311&e=f6564bbe3b)
---
| | | |
---

name: HAPPY BIRTHDAY PRESIDENT CARTER (via DCCC)
subject: will you sign President Carter’s card?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Wish President Jimmy Carter a happy birthday!
| | **It 's President Jimmy Carter's birthday!! **

**And here at Democratic HQ, we 're celebrating President Carter's special day with a card signed by his best supporters --_but your name 's not on it!_

Will you sign his card before midnight tonight to make this his best birthday yet?**
**
[https://action.dccc.org/card/carter-birthday](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| [SIGN THE CARD: Wish President Jimmy Carter a Happy Birthday before midnight! >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_4-~)
---

We're emotional over here at Democratic Headquarters.

On President Carter's special day, we can't help but reflect on all the INCREDIBLE things he's done for our country!
[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/d30Et6g-)
We want to show how PROUD we are of President Carter's incredible legacy.

**So we 're calling on 15,000 of his best supporters to sign his birthday card before midnight tonight.**

Will you help us make President Carter's day INCREDIBLE?

---
[QUICKLY: Sign President Carter's birthday card before midnight >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/YG_)
---

Thanks,

DCCC

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. name: Defeat Ron DeSantis
subject: DeSantis’ lead has “evaporated.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Common Good Virginia
body:
According to a new poll. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruYikPsfek94EdMZa9G4R70P9mEc0cDPhf7bjbaUqXdLQqW8YczUHlShBBIldPxbNvQAayXFI2qphzLuGCFuqSsbHsVS09Grwj6y5AtdUldOScw4g1ibnr6X-1y0OHPIUXQkt3pRG5TlBUHgQ2u-QjOpJ-3tSjzWc6pHmPbBtzuN4RRmMQnfE_v-P_6FYUu1EbRfPG-ubF6pTmk0CLwi8lidBEWtxJkRrVUeMUSp4iVUiZz6-xlJcGXznoZ5ggmwdfI2e0UkswIeYnk8NiRLE9sURb_acOUWItAJDti7sXi5U/3fs/Swem8Gi7Sme1UY3DQCEwlQ/h0/_sInizEFWdkCx_dOeTG-NI27FM80zedHpDVxGd49oW0)
This is such huge news, Derek -- Gov. DeSantis’ lead has “evaporated.” Floridians are fed up with Gov. DeSantis, and now this new poll proves what we’ve known all along -- that people are hungry for a Florida for All, Gov. DeSantis is vulnerable, and Charlie Crist can win in 2022.

However, there’s no way we’ll be able to pull off a win without the full backing of grassroots donors. We see the numbers, and we see our path to victory. There’s no way we’ll get there without your support -- and we need you now. [**Can you split a donation today between our campaign and Common Good VA?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtqBszT-C7glSRly-ge4mixF5rcIoDeVcI5r8EDMgruYikPsfek94EdMZa9G4R70OV7fkZKXqcPkXP-R8seo5lMimn4cdyWGah4MjORbM-3B437ZtM9p5_PE1c42OWWqrkgP4_XSrSZYUDBH1J98c2MB09fMvqeZKaCsDKYn1asjaimJHqPz-nQj1awNHxBnWtirafgxRs6oV0UhijIidvJKBqqh2CxrRRnT8NXl6Hftg2BzsNicB16tT4C1MF4_WeYpJifyaXhnI1jF0JRmTgMyAyXbl3NwEnB0Dhf8kZhzvoWheJBkfX-e6bs6k1lgCt5fRvhXdCZhP-SMUmOaba/3fs/Swem8Gi7Sme1UY3DQCEwlQ/h1/CYNTWoSnhvB0W5-Q4lxM7qzQ-ryCxL2vFZxoGxgoAuE)

\-- Team Crist

\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Charlie Crist for Governor**
Subject: BREAKING NEW POLL: Charlie Crist leads Ron DeSantis 45% - 44%

**ST. PETE POLLS: Charlie Crist 45% - Ron DeSantis 44%**

Derek,

clean_body: According to a new poll. | | | This is such huge news, Derek -- Gov. DeSantis’ lead has “evaporated.” Floridians are fed up with Gov. DeSantis, and now this new poll proves what we’ve known all along -- that people are hungry for a Florida for All, Gov. DeSantis is vulnerable, and Charlie Crist can win in 2022. However, there’s no way we’ll be able to pull off a win without the full backing of grassroots donors. We see the numbers, and we see our path to victory. There’s no way we’ll get there without your support -- and we need you now. \-- Team Crist \---------- Forwarded Message ---------- From: Charlie Crist for Governor Subject: BREAKING NEW POLL: Charlie Crist leads Ron DeSantis 45% - 44% ST. body:
If we want to win back the Senate, I need to know if you’re with me. Join Team Herschel today! |
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a33863ae3da84b6297a42e3a5abe9030&_e=iyd-JDWmv9Wz1X7lrVJmHtpVXocT1JaH54B3YtgCgWnFhmoDJ4DFY1ywiEsJh28Scw2e-meZj3JzYJPRlfkuYgB-xJYNdMLFgumg_kn0jZN_UWwwgJkOtGgeUN7S8VgE3jsuxv4viUhnh0QL1MB9oR1If8ziMJ74foiqQsaTBfvSB4UuUB8McL9aXKcTEAf7TWalIkuyInywNYccGJiyDnE1A_HwhfrdBgwURmW2oaFTFNRDl5KXzYk_4_wC72hbkeMxPZED5xOWwWiuNMix1WRcoH9g0w9gWh2BNrhG0LsPeWHbtgeoTDWNjD6SuhXMtt0_32mvz4L4mQfOAOnIerbxji9JkGIGiwlsyAbz9N59Hv2y3Xkgma7-HyIq9dmenYe_UFCHERQYz0ayeiw0nN-rv-3veqvunZRLQJVU89N6QNJq0o9Usgblg2ZP7wGD0QS9sNo7ChWVuYXQZUGXwY4FlsrJyyAhOrMJviImVA4%3D)

Peter,

I’ve been on a lot of teams.

From playing football, basketball, and running track in high school to playing football at the University of Georgia and then in the USFL and NFL, _**I know what makes a good teammate.**_

We must rely on our teammates to come together for a common cause, and a team must be prepared from the start of the season to win.

Peter, our common cause right now is winning back the United States Senate, and the critical battle has already begun. The path to a Republican majority in the Senate runs straight through Georgia.

**[Will you become one of my earliest teammates as I recruit a winning team?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a33863ae3da84b6297a42e3a5abe9030&_e=iyd-JDWmv9Wz1X7lrVJmHtpVXocT1JaH54B3YtgCgWnFhmoDJ4DFY1ywiEsJh28Scw2e-meZj3JzYJPRlfkuYgB-xJYNdMLFgumg_kn0jZN_UWwwgJkOtGgeUN7S8VgE3jsuxv4viUhnh0QL1MB9oR1If8ziMJ74foiqQsaTBfvSB4UuUB8McL9aXKcTEAf7TWalIkuyInywNYccGJiyDnE1A_HwhfrdBgwURmW2oaFTFNRDl5KXzYk_4_wC72hb_HJuzyUqlBRtmTgUv_gPlcAvFbuwtJvSWPfnhDqqvtgIP6ARDmpk0q1da3N385RTrDTSROEWGc3PcwDwptnBpfnnBL6R79CKwuIwk-2Sip4LmKCSxFjQ-uARAoS7JeT2D7MpKoIGyUgWlQ-bCQmtOY67FmwlyB8mEsq7MSHGmILym5R0_e9vlaPgamIDHGyJIBoJHa9xsZNWBFQdYWuVMIZfnNjumOzny8ONG-KQM0E%3D) **

[** JOIN TEAM HERSCHEL » **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a33863ae3da84b6297a42e3a5abe9030&_e=iyd-JDWmv9Wz1X7lrVJmHtpVXocT1JaH54B3YtgCgWnFhmoDJ4DFY1ywiEsJh28Scw2e-meZj3JzYJPRlfkuYgB-xJYNdMLFgumg_kn0jZN_UWwwgJkOtGgeUN7S8VgE3jsuxv4viUhnh0QL1MB9oR1If8ziMJ74foiqQsaTBfvSB4UuUB8McL9aXKcTEAf7TWalIkuyInywNYccGJiyDnE1A_HwhfrdBgwURmW2oaFTFNRDl5KXzYk_4_wC72hbDcn5VWhSnOPs1bgroxcVAPGdVg_PfdTqSGA46VbqnG5fd-7JVnWng2ptMN5p6Xlz7RN6OOTEU0aGQmnAsozI822gYCTHZgicoL1bpFQOuvgyvjxx_SAM_CgrsJqP5abNJQdKNALps_WQ8MbQjCxQc9D4oA4PT0A8SMP7re_lkzIAH7JRPLYg0fECA3FETSXxQwi7SHX9InBSVguLtHvzmyZjcu2cyz4SD0kd8hQRrzg%3D)
I am running against Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock. He’s a proud liberal who has voted for every radical idea that’s come across his desk in Washington.

He’s pushing for open borders, higher taxes, and bigger government.

This race is too important to sit on the sidelines. That’s just one of the reasons I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. **Georgians deserve better._America deserves better_.**

As I begin my campaign for Senate, I need to know you’re with me, Peter. That’s why I am reaching out to conservative leaders like you to join my team.

**[Will you chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to be one of my first Team Herschel recruits?](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a33863ae3da84b6297a42e3a5abe9030&_e=iyd-JDWmv9Wz1X7lrVJmHtpVXocT1JaH54B3YtgCgWnFhmoDJ4DFY1ywiEsJh28Scw2e-meZj3JzYJPRlfkuYgB-xJYNdMLFgumg_kn0jZN_UWwwgJkOtGgeUN7S8VgE3jsuxv4viUhnh0QL1MB9oR1If8ziMJ74foiqQsaTBfvSB4UuUB8McL9aXKcTEAf7TWalIkuyInywNYccGJiyDnE1A_HwhfrdBgwURmW2oaFTFNRDl5KXzYk_4_wC72hbjOujVt4BXcg1yrMAjq_V6-dqtlYbvD676BEB95iNKNL1ZXs8_z3lv94yqGH1TKEzrzXjsl9Ojxo6a5XGefJr06BHdBu9oDq0mzylxq10F3d2jpuBYc3g7An7P2Xbu17-ufTxWujb0Ev_ScVQ_VuRTV8a_8mqfWkz9Hk22DXVgzU0EfpUT42MQNUnRnNGNxhdTIMrZiw5pyEeOmROtEffB9jyoYIsQMcP2sDfjt8mKk8%3D) **

I’ve been on many winning teams, but this is the most important team I’ve ever been a part of. Peter, the future of our country is at stake. I hope you’ll help me win this seat and win back the Senate majority.

Thanks,

Hi Friend -- Before you head off for the weekend, we just wanted to remind you that Democrats are actively **trying to pass the**[**largest tax hike**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=KNH_XjgHz1JYY6cF2ityOchzndiumJRc7u7IDGPCzX4hSJOoisBCMaKSu0Too_4Qzd75iOSEuZkHbFVHxkAnmmR8nD1BKn5cg2pXe7xGmq2qbPedukP5havSHnQXvkC1AFC3r0EJoF_O8J1hY5WBqkTtiuh7BtiiPca03-bXk5k&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dem_tax_hike_1001_v3&n=2)**in recent decades****.** The advertised price tag on this lofty investment is $3.5 trillion, but the real cost of **Democrats’ tax-and-spend spree is **[**even higher**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=2__0Newq7HZOw6sNdJFardP6d82n8QN_Mfy7CbIygrLUigaeBmPuidVu5ckNCgHcwDnIKFcfvalVSPPU9eDS_cooZABkD4kPzYlqwKIyFS8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dem_tax_hike_1001_v3&n=3)**.** **Recent estimates show the plan will truly cost over $5 trillion** Biden’s economy is already squeezing many American workers and trillions more in inflationary spending will only make things worse. [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7IyMUCt1AWkqSwIK1D71ClIgWF9FlfD1xaPmxGY-DqXHdw7dteT_XX7kAxxw3JIIVvREZmobLdFGmfMZ873s1ydJy4UwZQykvnoo1VKT2rhp&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dem_tax_hike_1001_v3&n=4) Senator Ron Johnson joined **[Fox& Friends](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=KVYzWTFUuJ0SsyVZLAg-7IyMUCt1AWkqSwIK1D71ClIgWF9FlfD1xaPmxGY-DqXHdw7dteT_XX7kAxxw3JIIVvREZmobLdFGmfMZ873s1ydJy4UwZQykvnoo1VKT2rhp&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dem_tax_hike_1001_v3&n=5)** today to talk about Democrats delaying a vote on the smaller $1.5 trillion package. Check out the interview above! -Team WISGOP
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dem_tax_hike_1001_v3&n=6 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=dem_tax_hike_1001_v3&n=6)
